| Friends, Tennesseans deserve to meet their next US Senator. I'm running to represent every person from Mountain City to Memphis, Turtletown to Tiptonville, and everywhere in between. With 10 weeks to Election Day, we are in a great position to win this, thanks to conservatives like you. **Would you consider chipping in $10.00 right now to help me get my message out?** [Donate $10.00](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkfhdik-uunkhiuw-j/) [DONATE OTHER AMOUNT](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkfhdik-uunkhiuw-t/) Make no mistake, this race is Manny vs. the Machine and I need your help to fight the career politicians. I cannot wait to see you out on the road in our big orange bus this summer as I visit every corner of this state, just as I have been doing for the past year. name: Bill Hagerty
subject: The most important stretch of this campaign
body:
It’s just 50 DAYS until early voting starts in our primary.
Peter,It's just 50 DAYS until early voting starts in our primary.And with our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Sunday, **we 're officially entering the most important stretch of this campaign.**That's why I'm asking for your support right now to fund our CRITICAL get-out-the-vote operation. [FUND OUR GOTV PROGRAM](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pgiiiy-fuutjhhtj-r/) We have canvassers, phonebanks, mail, and ads that will help put us over the top. **But we can 't pay for any of it without you.**When President Trump endorsed my candidacy, I knew he was counting on me to win.And now we're counting on you, to fund the critical program that will do it. [**Can you chip-in?**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pgiiiy-fuutjhhtj-y/) Thank you for your support. Bill HagertyCandidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pgiiiy-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pgiiiy-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pgiiiy-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pgiiiy-fuutjhhtj-d/)

name: mikebloomberg.com
subject: Trump's firings should be investigated
body:
He's undermining trust when we need it most

| _You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you!_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=e5b3815bf2a042f28ec47a0ef03d72b9&_e=I-UEga1JY_AJ0qoNvQpg7TEhcyGzE3iytpy7GcFGexhRkGc8CBVPPyWQ17Ayr5-pMt57P4LYxSi_fSrlZO9n2s7Pq08oLD44jPlm1aTcobmBovjZORTY5LNdpLpbe9dgw4lttGPOTF9unVynjw42ZE9XU2rIQETUasp0U4xP7jdaKmducoVhM2gJL2yQv5dIM-JrIjUOfAaolXdNyxgkJeu4pJ-IogfUkOVkycriioZi69NUbpfceE6nqKO2dJE8RzGqyC1kxowKQFMHL1CoLg%3D%3D) Friend, Since early April, confirmed COVID-19 cases in the U.S. jumped from 275,000 to more than 1.7 million. In that time, while we needed laser focus on fighting the pandemic, President Donald Trump has instead put his energy into undermining trust and transparency in our government. Since April, he has removed four independent Inspectors General tasked with rooting out potential corruption and illegal activity at federal agencies. Among those four was the official selected to oversee the implementation of the initial $2 trillion COVID-19 relief bill, as well as an individual who published a report outlining shortfalls in the administration’s COVID-19 response. **[Mike recently published an editorial on why Congress needs to investigate these firings and check Trump's attempts to evade accountability. Read it now and share with your friends.](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=e5b3815bf2a042f28ec47a0ef03d72b9&_e=I-UEga1JY_AJ0qoNvQpg7Y-TnEoJ2F21YIa_CDZj3uB9qR1D5tdpAPwiHm5JQ8VRcqgnz3nGoyHkOiMyeQXjiQ8U2d35D4U0knoWRDHjI_pq82u_RlcWq4XXV003Gdm0f7mVlNNi_cEiLyo2_l0VjhNdqimbkQIlVOF9egtXZP7t3uqgKRu2tCGQprmEFQPTu3AJXHDU5Xedd9ZjK9EXYwiINpUS1_gM_1yrbp2HrupSBWuiUUj1s_t6tLzxI0eby-BncrwsdszkSHofqocw20N0VYFRimRrJjZX8s0CMVEKgTSB1XD3FnJvab4tw6fZb1v-NKwXJFMdYxTjhmwJqMbhv0vnrGV250siNrL_8wHdbliGeR0mgqkNhZLtBdBtmtH77u5Q2Xm0VYKzJG7v4aHWxrgOKitssjMg5fnBr84vV4SvQWSDqST60SoLSJQev7a3dKkBDXcqjuTgCv1J_w%3D%3D)** Americans deserve to know that our leaders are acting on behalf of the people they serve -- not to advance their own political or personal interests. That's true at any time. It's even more vital at a moment like this one, when millions of lives and trillions of dollars are at stake. **Mike is calling for hearings into the removal of four independent Inspectors General since April. Read his piece, then share:** [**https://www.bloomberg.com/opinion/articles/2020-05-24/trump-s-firing-of-inspectors-general-must-be-checked-by-congress**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=e5b3815bf2a042f28ec47a0ef03d72b9&_e=I-UEga1JY_AJ0qoNvQpg7Y-TnEoJ2F21YIa_CDZj3uB9qR1D5tdpAPwiHm5JQ8VRcqgnz3nGoyHkOiMyeQXjiQ8U2d35D4U0knoWRDHjI_pq82u_RlcWq4XXV003Gdm0f7mVlNNi_cEiLyo2_l0VjhNdqimbkQIlVOF9egtXZP7t3uqgKRu2tCGQprmEFQPTu3AJXHDU5Xedd9ZjK9EXYwiINpUS1_gM_1yrbp2HrupSBWuiUUj1s_t6tLzxI0ebVZ7Fzm3i1FAN9kLdg_1P_IgohnvqyIjM5m6NTQZOxqAm6r4ER523hNTA8-1lyXh-SLKluO1U7-hIBEEbSMxCKCDvAnii8r9qRozW14QKQJMp0lAjWCgx1Q_Qa2KYB9iWlVhm7uzi1ISACwgdjNMxZtkYqBqzZxEpX5TYt2FzB0DqqRgjaEfn0ogQwVUyPMcplIw7XUfMV6BUpuJHG41Q5g%3D%3D) body:

Then, the Holcomb administration inked a hefty $17.9 million contract to conduct COVID-19 testing. Apparently, the Holcomb administration only engaged with one company. The catch? name: Tina Ramirez
subject: Essential
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC
body:
Tina Ramirez for U.S. Congress
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |

---
[](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkvihit-udthdyhkil-i/)
| | | Friend, Let me be clear: **I proudly stand with President Trump in protecting our right to worship**. __**This Was The Right Call.**__ The government does not get to decide if churches are essential, and today, **I am calling on America's governors to re-open places of worship**. _As someone who has defended religious liberty -- for ALL people -- around the world_ , _I stand with the president in protecting our constitutional rights_. Churches are _**NOT**_ the same as liquor stores, bars, or restaurants -- and it is _**NOT**_ the place of government to designate our faith and our beliefs as "non-essential." Unfortunately, throughout this pandemic, we've seen governors -- _including our own_ \-- allowing Americans to be taken to court for simply following their faith. __**This Is Wrong.**__ The U.S Constitution is very clear -- **the right to peacefully practice your religious convictions is essential to the soul** , and as your voice in Congress, I'll fight for _**EVERY**_ American's right to worship. Thank You, Tina Ramirez
---
---

The U.S. Senate is in desperate need of experienced leaders like Teresa Tomlinson. I’ve known Teresa for years: first, as a talented lawyer, and second, as a great Mayor of Columbus, Georgia. As the most recently elected Democratic Governor of Georgia, I know firsthand that we will need a candidate with that type of experience to win in November.

I trust Teresa — who has taken on corporate bullies in federal court and led Columbus out of the Great Recession to be one of America’s 25 Best Run Cities — to lead our ticket and take advantage of a historic opportunity for Georgia Democrats in this election. **Teresa is statistically tied in her first-ever head-to-head poll with David Perdue, and her campaign is only getting stronger.**

[**Your donations are keeping Teresa’s campaign ads running in every media market in Georgia, reaching thousands of voters daily. clean_body: | | | | = ** | | Hello friend — former Georgia Governor Roy Barnes here. The U.S. Senate is in desperate need of experienced leaders like Teresa Tomlinson. I’ve known Teresa for years: first, as a talented lawyer, and second, as a great Mayor of Columbus, Georgia. As the most recently elected Democratic Governor of Georgia, I know firsthand that we will need a candidate with that type of experience to win in November. I trust Teresa — who has taken on corporate bullies in federal court and led Columbus out of the Great Recession to be one of America’s 25 Best Run Cities — to lead our ticket and take advantage of a historic opportunity for Georgia Democrats in this election. Teresa is statistically tied in her first-ever head-to-head poll with David Perdue, and her campaign is only getting stronger. = | | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = I want to thank you for investing your time and money into this campaign. It is so critically important — together, we will elect a leader that Georgians deserve. Yours truly, Roy Barnes Governor of Georgia 1999-2003 PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17667426/202345033/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjhhZDgyOS1hZGExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqC1hU0r_h9azWb4i-cGKmsuHaENW-RvW541rprNBn0=)**

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Good News: Haircuts, Youth Sports, and Rent Assistance
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
It continues to be my intention to move into Phase 2 on June 1 --- provided that the data tells us it's safe to do so. As you know, phase 2 is a big step forward. We're going to see a reopening of most sectors of our economy. I hear every day from folks who are anxious to know what the new rules will be so they can prepare. Today, on [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00185KvoebxVp5Fsu55Wvnykla1xjxoP9YF9-n_DogQlAcDvtHwHEvzpS8p2cyVBxWCPq6z1vRDkDc2q0Cv9JM46XGOVTfRfylHUHVAmJ74Ykvw7eGhopgGd_YEGXIrW73eIepRmhM3Sawp2Ni0xZN3jg==&c=_zIR-WXH1eeV3bgAE-GPNDJjBGIgoV0kI2u4TyKCH9NNkWv7Nh570w==&ch=-pz263dZg1c1bCuVfZMffyyV-Pz9rt5P822JS3QXBK9TCgXNwIzAWQ==) we will be posting new guidelines for personal services guidelines and youth sports. I know there's a lot of interest in how we'll be bringing these operations back, and so I just want to briefly give you an idea of what the new rules will be.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00185KvoebxVp5Fsu55Wvnykla1xjxoP9YF9-n_DogQlAcDvtHwHEvzpWzuAKqbo2Wv-wgPZoHkRMbTwnyWEXeMb_S-CLWXw7t-7ZvwwaKhtrZLttJt_rL1Xv8SIRZvoo6-20j1JL_NLJyzbcX7a5DIGOSJTqweqROOf0XMqvisd_fwAM0HY2tzKcQdYIM15otfvHPysNtMYuw=&c=_zIR-WXH1eeV3bgAE-GPNDJjBGIgoV0kI2u4TyKCH9NNkWv7Nh570w==&ch=-pz263dZg1c1bCuVfZMffyyV-Pz9rt5P822JS3QXBK9TCgXNwIzAWQ==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00185KvoebxVp5Fsu55Wvnykla1xjxoP9YF9-n_DogQlAcDvtHwHEvzpWzuAKqbo2Wv-wgPZoHkRMbTwnyWEXeMb_S-CLWXw7t-7ZvwwaKhtrZLttJt_rL1Xv8SIRZvoo6-20j1JL_NLJyzbcX7a5DIGOSJTqweqROOf0XMqvisd_fwAM0HY2tzKcQdYIM15otfvHPysNtMYuw=&c=_zIR-WXH1eeV3bgAE-GPNDJjBGIgoV0kI2u4TyKCH9NNkWv7Nh570w==&ch=-pz263dZg1c1bCuVfZMffyyV-Pz9rt5P822JS3QXBK9TCgXNwIzAWQ==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| Personal Services: In Phase Two, we're going to begin reopening personal services like haircuts, manicures, and tattoos under new rules:

* There will be capacity restrictions.
* Reservations will be strongly recommended.
* Use of waiting areas will be discouraged.
* Everyone will have to wear face coverings and wash their hands.
* More stringent cleaning rules will be in place.
* Businesses will retain names and phone numbers of customers for contact tracing purposes.
* Customers will have to maintain 6 feet of social distancing.

While these are going to create a much different environment than we're used to, this isn't forever. This is for Phase Two, and if we all follow these rules, I'm hopeful that we'll be able to continue moving forward with reopening more of our state safely. You can read more about the rules at [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00185KvoebxVp5Fsu55Wvnykla1xjxoP9YF9-n_DogQlAcDvtHwHEvzpS8p2cyVBxWCPq6z1vRDkDc2q0Cv9JM46XGOVTfRfylHUHVAmJ74Ykvw7eGhopgGd_YEGXIrW73eIepRmhM3Sawp2Ni0xZN3jg==&c=_zIR-WXH1eeV3bgAE-GPNDJjBGIgoV0kI2u4TyKCH9NNkWv7Nh570w==&ch=-pz263dZg1c1bCuVfZMffyyV-Pz9rt5P822JS3QXBK9TCgXNwIzAWQ==).
Youth Sports: Sports are so important for kids' development. Not only is physical activity critical, but it also teaches values like determination, teamwork, and resilience. To that end, we've been working around the clock to be able to enable youth sports this summer in a way that's safe, and I'm excited to announce that we will be able to begin youth sports during Phase 2, which we expect will begin on Monday. As with everything else, we need new guidance and safety precautions in place to keep kids, parents, and coaches safe.
Beginning in phase 2, youth sports may resume with stable groups of 15 people or fewer, including adults. As we've mentioned, there unfortunately cannot be games or tournaments. If multiple of these stable groups are interacting, then it defeats the purpose. I know that's hard to hear, but it's important.
For at least the next month, the focus should be on practices and scrimmages within these stable groups. As with everything else, social distancing is important. Adult leaders should be at least six feet apart at all times, and kids should be six feet - and ideally 14 feet - whenever possible. These are going to be tough rules, but they're necessary to keep our kids and families safe. You can read more about the rules at [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00185KvoebxVp5Fsu55Wvnykla1xjxoP9YF9-n_DogQlAcDvtHwHEvzpS8p2cyVBxWCPq6z1vRDkDc2q0Cv9JM46XGOVTfRfylHUHVAmJ74Ykvw7eGhopgGd_YEGXIrW73eIepRmhM3Sawp2Ni0xZN3jg==&c=_zIR-WXH1eeV3bgAE-GPNDJjBGIgoV0kI2u4TyKCH9NNkWv7Nh570w==&ch=-pz263dZg1c1bCuVfZMffyyV-Pz9rt5P822JS3QXBK9TCgXNwIzAWQ==).
Rental Assistance: A few weeks ago, I announced $1.5 million for a fund that has supported hundreds of families repay their owed rent, but we know the need is even greater. Today, I'm announcing an additional $5 million for the emergency rental assistance fund. This money is available to available to low-income renters who have been impacted by the COVID-19 emergency and are at immediate risk of homelessness. Those who qualify can receive a grant of up to $5,000 to support past due rent payments and other fees. Go to [HousingHelpRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00185KvoebxVp5Fsu55Wvnykla1xjxoP9YF9-n_DogQlAcDvtHwHEvzpYOCDPdtYbaHYHdeMxhB6F7pbNQeOTJv8_IlcLNhkLxVJPNBFDlLMlDfaGbHi_FIT6p-Hl384A6KANrUSi_MtsYMMVUtoyS0qA==&c=_zIR-WXH1eeV3bgAE-GPNDJjBGIgoV0kI2u4TyKCH9NNkWv7Nh570w==&ch=-pz263dZg1c1bCuVfZMffyyV-Pz9rt5P822JS3QXBK9TCgXNwIzAWQ==) to view requirements and apply, or call 211 and they'll help you.
In addition, we have been in constant dialogue with the courts regarding evictions. They are planning to begin hearing cases again next week. However, the court initially will only be hearing evictions that were initiated prior to COVID - anything filed before March 17. And the courts have told us that no COVID-related evictions will be heard before July 1.
There's no question that this crisis has hit hardest for those who can least afford it. My top priority is reopening our economy safely and getting Rhode Islanders back to work. We know that reopening the economy won't happen overnight, and we will need to continue to support the most vulnerable. We know we need a longer-term solution, and I hope to be back with more to say on this front in the coming weeks.
---
| I am so proud of the way that Rhode Islanders have come together to support their neighbors and stop the spread of COVID-19. Tomorrow, I plan to talk about where we stand with all of the metrics we're monitoring so that you can see the fruits of your labor. By cooperating with each other, we can beat COVID-19 and build a stronger, more resilient Rhode Island.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00185KvoebxVp5Fsu55Wvnykla1xjxoP9YF9-n_DogQlAcDvtHwHEvzpXgCX3MTrqlqaBPsrA391Q75jXZWIL3eVPw52DFOwGq2Ax9Oah5ez--RJQEwqE26oPYZ2IMPjtRZl9hcH8iDEbyl-RtLOm9yMA6dZYG_2xCGfRHwPtgEzMHx6huCEVNienqtxH7RwoUc55tp8yDXbZNZiEJb_dn95qATKwAb1dJHzqxE7D97mPkbBd4ivzvHVHmLjzOUjilIGmmkJVcAjdJ8nJ1-_fIclJcEeKHFOZReNqXXikqASGzmFd2P7sT5-pYno0r5gGSNnSRwo8UYUCU=&c=_zIR-WXH1eeV3bgAE-GPNDJjBGIgoV0kI2u4TyKCH9NNkWv7Nh570w==&ch=-pz263dZg1c1bCuVfZMffyyV-Pz9rt5P822JS3QXBK9TCgXNwIzAWQ==).
---

name: Betsy R.
subject: Tea Party Take-Over?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
****
---

Peter

I am disheartened, to put it mildly.

During a Memorial Day gathering, when we traditionally honor those who have made the ultimate sacrifice by dying for their country, my current State Senator John Eklund chose to join the Tea Party to attack his own Republican Governor Mike DeWine for asking Ohio citizens to sacrifice by staying home as much as possible during this pandemic.

_A few low-lights from his speech included:_

****

Fortunately, Senator Eklund is term-limited and I'm running for his seat. **But the man against whom I am running has also opposed Governor DeWine 's judgment and last week referred to the governor's actions as "Home Enslavement" while speaking as Lake County Commissioner at a public meeting. **

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/DI6zYLFN9WOcJpArzgidrwnVuYrRYBVBMaKq7iO-q1M=/egLPp0x8bYZyRXz_QD2YnU0LEkGaodBtzpgKSUxPSEY=?refcode=deadline4)

The fact is, an overwhelming majority of Ohioans agree with the safety measures put in place to protect our neighbors, friends, and families. But extremists have taken power in Ohio and are speaking the loudest. This is what we're up against -- a small minority have gerrymandered their way to power and endanger our very health and lives with their refusal to do something so simple as wear a mask around others.

**We need fact-based, level-headed leaders in our elected offices, not another state senator who will follow in Senator Eklund 's footsteps, railing against the governor of his own party and opposing policies with which a majority of Ohioans agree.**

_Today is the last day before an important fundraising deadline, and we are only $985 away from our goal, so a donation from you today can make a big difference!_ _If you 're able, a contribution today helps me run a strong campaign and keeps extremists out of our legislature._

You can click the button below to donate, and please consider sharing his e-mail with a few friends to help us spread the facts.

Thanks so much for your support.

Sincerely,
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/DI6zYLFN9WOcJpArzgidrwnVuYrRYBVBMaKq7iO-q1M=/TpIvXaqeAdV8KKy50ozO1YFAf44InRwekW-w4iOVtA0=?refcode=deadline4)

_P.S. You can read the article about the rally and view the Senator 's full speech by clicking here: _

clean_body: | | | | ** Peter I am disheartened, to put it mildly. During a Memorial Day gathering, when we traditionally honor those who have made the ultimate sacrifice by dying for their country, my current State Senator John Eklund chose to join the Tea Party to attack his own Republican Governor Mike DeWine for asking Ohio citizens to sacrifice by staying home as much as possible during this pandemic. A few low-lights from his speech included: Fortunately, Senator Eklund is term-limited and I'm running for his seat. But the man against whom I am running has also opposed Governor DeWine 's judgment and last week referred to the governor's actions as "Home Enslavement" while speaking as Lake County Commissioner at a public meeting. The fact is, an overwhelming majority of Ohioans agree with the safety measures put in place to protect our neighbors, friends, and families. But extremists have taken power in Ohio and are speaking the loudest. This is what we're up against -- a small minority have gerrymandered their way to power and endanger our very health and lives with their refusal to do something so simple as wear a mask around others. We need fact-based, level-headed leaders in our elected offices, not another state senator who will follow in Senator Eklund 's footsteps, railing against the governor of his own party and opposing policies with which a majority of Ohioans agree.** Today is the last day before an important fundraising deadline, and we are only $985 away from our goal, so a donation from you today can make a big difference! If you 're able, a contribution today helps me run a strong campaign and keeps extremists out of our legislature. You can click the button below to donate, and please consider sharing his e-mail with a few friends to help us spread the facts. Thanks so much for your support. Sincerely, P.S. You can read the article about the rally and view the Senator 's full speech by clicking here: _ Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader Friends of Betsy Rader PO Box 280 Novelty OH 44072 United States =

[**Trump has ranted for months about his obsession to SHUT DOWN the U.S. Postal Service.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17671223/202400899/1128025556?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmZjYwMTU5LWMwYTEtZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q4iaBxtF-FUqdgEQoJBp6gA4jmgqotvuL0EwA-NH7Ns=&emci=633157d8-0fa1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=5ff60159-c0a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4584036)

Post Offices provide affordable mail, let us send gifts and cards, and help everyone expand their voting rights through Vote-By-Mail.

**But if this new Postmaster General takes his orders from Trump, he'll be happy to shut every local office down!**

subject: [VIDEO] Do Chris Pappas and Ann Kuster agree with their colleague?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| |

| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDMxODI3MjQ4Nzg0MDg2NTgxJmM9bTR2OCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTMwODk2NjImZD1xM3kyZTJq.etg9nPYJDRrKRGlqBYWu4WRZIm52HrEh2OfIOTfp1SA)
| | |

| |
---
| Derek, When **Ann Kuster** and **Chris Pappas** voted for the **Democrats' $3 Trillion Wishlist** , we knew they were doing so due to politics and **Nancy Pelosi** 's marching orders. Their colleague, California Democrat **Katie Porter** , confirmed that reasoning for her - [do Kuster and Pappas agree?](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDMxODI3MjQ4Nzg0MDg2NTgxJmM9bTR2OCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTMwODk2NjQmZD1lMnYxbjZp.p-yl2PQV_-72vV-BOeYTxH2M0bMbdZzXvqNxqn8YmRo)
---
---
| | | [](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDMxODI3MjQ4Nzg0MDg2NTgxJmM9bTR2OCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTMwODk2NjYmZD1pN243dThh.aLZ1JPSCZLozSdyZWt_2afNU6OZWkkE-lRY5zmJh4AE)
---
| |
---
| Ann Kuster and Chris Pappas' $3 Trillion Wishlist included:
* $1,200 payments to illegal immigrants.
* A blanket release of prisoners, including murderers and rapists.
* The use of taxpayer funds to subsidize abortion.
* Forcing states like New Hampshire to comply with stringent federal election mandates, including no ID requirement for in-person voting and ballot harvesting.
* Protecting illegals from deportation and grant them work authorization during the pandemic, allowing them to work at jobs that could be held by unemployed Americans.

Now, does this really sound like the type of plan Granite Staters would want to see during a global pandemic? Democrats are openly discussing how bad this bill is, but they voted for it anyways. This wasn't a case of having to pass the bill before they could find out what was in it - they knew how bad it was and still pushed it through. Democrats like Ann Kuster and Chris Pappas do a phenomenal job as foot soldiers for Nancy Pelosi, but they do a terrible job fighting for New Hampshire. **We need to fight back.**
---

body:
Dark money groups and Pelosi's PAC have lined up millions to spend against us -- and this is only the beginning. Going up against the Democrats' cash flood, it's going to take all hands on deck to flip this top-targeted seat from blue to red.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BH80c-mN8dVKjryZG6_PaUUURvnwdQQqTSNrxNwSHhzh8x2c1ZBg6cJOrUNjs9sLfKEFcMgrwQ-PQnBmC3GgKwbT0dozTwroHF3IQaFvY8Ws9RiaVdYF7ICb0gXcq4ThT4C4rR5mt8nTbvwIFG-0Rlh79vGUoRVsNWAFPHu-anbMqsKaS0-ow2HngW3CEgFAZirwdre282MjUfYOKCy7AwOZJwR5M63FLAzqXRhXZXUWMFhGtRps9FZJeocja4CjjVl7bhtaGfCn4dqSSHigznz4RMH8mFYt67tswYmzaxXLaeHP8hAkUVMQD6Ducc8KXqC9dCMZQTzIjS0ng5OEO3yWhVGahT_n6_sOhNOnL5L-fxfsyzp_i5pvV8hmVoNVUyRo8WduJ9s=&c=-aCgRb72nk8fW_PTPfc52eqskRc5BgtCizYG6JDAdhE6t9k0qpB-3Q==&ch=QRXORaQ2j9AEwrV0i8pUMsh0vu8knYwYwJ8fsV9nQi2DM547dH6ZlQ==) Friend, I hate to ask, but this is important.

Dark money groups and Pelosi's PAC have lined up millions to spend against us -- _and this is only the beginning._ Going up against the Democrats' cash flood, it's going to take all hands on deck to flip this top-targeted seat from blue to red.

**To keep up, we 're going to need a last minute grassroots surge ahead of Sunday's critical campaign deadline. [Can you make a 4X matched donation right now to keep us in the fight? ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BH80c-mN8dVKjryZG6_PaUUURvnwdQQqTSNrxNwSHhzh8x2c1ZBg6cJOrUNjs9sLfKEFcMgrwQ-PQnBmC3GgKwbT0dozTwroHF3IQaFvY8Ws9RiaVdYF7ICb0gXcq4ThT4C4rR5mt8nTbvwIFG-0Rlh79vGUoRVsNWAFPHu-anbMqsKaS0-ow2HngW3CEgFAZirwdre282MjUfYOKCy7AwOZJwR5M63FLAzqXRhXZXUWMFhGtRps9FZJeocja4CjjVl7bhtaGfCn4dqSSHigznz4RMH8mFYt67tswYmzaxXLaeHP8hAkUVMQD6Ducc8KXqC9dCMZQTzIjS0ng5OEO3yWhVGahT_n6_sOhNOnL5L-fxfsyzp_i5pvV8hmVoNVUyRo8WduJ9s=&c=-aCgRb72nk8fW_PTPfc52eqskRc5BgtCizYG6JDAdhE6t9k0qpB-3Q==&ch=QRXORaQ2j9AEwrV0i8pUMsh0vu8knYwYwJ8fsV9nQi2DM547dH6ZlQ==)**

When I was 19, I came to this county with my single mother in search of opportunity with hope for a better future. I watched my mother build a successful business only to be unfairly taxed and unable to fight back because she lacked the resources to take on a broken political system. From then on, I knew I needed to fight for my community and help those who couldn't help themselves.

Since then, I have pledged to vote against any new taxes and fight against any tax increases. During my time on the State Board of Equalization, I worked to enact quick, commonsense reforms and returned over $400 million to California taxpayers -- _money that was rightfully theirs._

Right now California is at a crossroads. Californians are fleeing the state in droves, desperate to find livable taxes and affordable housing. Either we continue down the Democrats' dangerous road to socialism or we take on the broken political system that took advantage of my mom all those years ago.

**That 's why we need to take action. It's time to rein in government spending, get rid of burdensome regulations that crush our small businesses, and build a better future with economic opportunity for ALL Californians. [Can you make a 4X matched donation right now to help us take back the House for Republicans and achieve just that?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BH80c-mN8dVKjryZG6_PaUUURvnwdQQqTSNrxNwSHhzh8x2c1ZBg6cJOrUNjs9sLfKEFcMgrwQ-PQnBmC3GgKwbT0dozTwroHF3IQaFvY8Ws9RiaVdYF7ICb0gXcq4ThT4C4rR5mt8nTbvwIFG-0Rlh79vGUoRVsNWAFPHu-anbMqsKaS0-ow2HngW3CEgFAZirwdre282MjUfYOKCy7AwOZJwR5M63FLAzqXRhXZXUWMFhGtRps9FZJeocja4CjjVl7bhtaGfCn4dqSSHigznz4RMH8mFYt67tswYmzaxXLaeHP8hAkUVMQD6Ducc8KXqC9dCMZQTzIjS0ng5OEO3yWhVGahT_n6_sOhNOnL5L-fxfsyzp_i5pvV8hmVoNVUyRo8WduJ9s=&c=-aCgRb72nk8fW_PTPfc52eqskRc5BgtCizYG6JDAdhE6t9k0qpB-3Q==&ch=QRXORaQ2j9AEwrV0i8pUMsh0vu8knYwYwJ8fsV9nQi2DM547dH6ZlQ==)**

With Democrats lining up millions to drown us out, it's important now more than ever we have your support. This campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you and right now, emails like this are our main means of staying in touch --_that 's why I'm so grateful every time you choose to open and read an email. _

Whether you're new to the team or you've been here since the start, I can't thank you enough for your help. We would not be where we are without your support.

Thanks again,

Michelle Steel [ 4X MATCH DONATE ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BH80c-mN8dVKjryZG6_PaUUURvnwdQQqTSNrxNwSHhzh8x2c1ZBg6cJOrUNjs9sLfKEFcMgrwQ-PQnBmC3GgKwbT0dozTwroHF3IQaFvY8Ws9RiaVdYF7ICb0gXcq4ThT4C4rR5mt8nTbvwIFG-0Rlh79vGUoRVsNWAFPHu-anbMqsKaS0-ow2HngW3CEgFAZirwdre282MjUfYOKCy7AwOZJwR5M63FLAzqXRhXZXUWMFhGtRps9FZJeocja4CjjVl7bhtaGfCn4dqSSHigznz4RMH8mFYt67tswYmzaxXLaeHP8hAkUVMQD6Ducc8KXqC9dCMZQTzIjS0ng5OEO3yWhVGahT_n6_sOhNOnL5L-fxfsyzp_i5pvV8hmVoNVUyRo8WduJ9s=&c=-aCgRb72nk8fW_PTPfc52eqskRc5BgtCizYG6JDAdhE6t9k0qpB-3Q==&ch=QRXORaQ2j9AEwrV0i8pUMsh0vu8knYwYwJ8fsV9nQi2DM547dH6ZlQ==)

clean_body: Dark money groups and Pelosi's PAC have lined up millions to spend against us -- and this is only the beginning. Going up against the Democrats' cash flood, it's going to take all hands on deck to flip this top-targeted seat from blue to red. == Friend, I hate to ask, but this is important. Dark money groups and Pelosi's PAC have lined up millions to spend against us -- and this is only the beginning. Going up against the Democrats' cash flood, it's going to take all hands on deck to flip this top-targeted seat from blue to red. To keep up, we 're going to need a last minute grassroots surge ahead of Sunday's critical campaign deadline. == When I was 19, I came to this county with my single mother in search of opportunity with hope for a better future. I watched my mother build a successful business only to be unfairly taxed and unable to fight back because she lacked the resources to take on a broken political system. From then on, I knew I needed to fight for my community and help those who couldn't help themselves. Since then, I have pledged to vote against any new taxes and fight against any tax increases. During my time on the State Board of Equalization, I worked to enact quick, commonsense reforms and returned over $400 million to California taxpayers -- money that was rightfully theirs. Right now California is at a crossroads. Californians are fleeing the state in droves, desperate to find livable taxes and affordable housing. Either we continue down the Democrats' dangerous road to socialism or we take on the broken political system that took advantage of my mom all those years ago. That 's why we need to take action. It's time to rein in government spending, get rid of burdensome regulations that crush our small businesses, and build a better future with economic opportunity for ALL Californians. == With Democrats lining up millions to drown us out, it's important now more than ever we have your support. This campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you and right now, emails like this are our main means of staying in touch --that 's why I'm so grateful every time you choose to open and read an email. Whether you're new to the team or you've been here since the start, I can't thank you enough for your help. We would not be where we are without your support. Thanks again, Michelle Steel == With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220 Huntington Beach, CA 92647 == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Stand Up For Freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
If we don’t begin reopening NYC now, this city will find itself in a severe fiscal crisis that nobody who loves this city wants to see. We must begin to reopen now.... safely and with precaution.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=165A223A1A2912)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

If we don’t begin reopening NYC now, this city will find itself in a severe fiscal crisis that nobody who loves this city wants to see.

We must begin to reopen now.... safely and with precaution.

Every passing day creates more uncertainty for restaurants, mom & pop shops and other small businesses struggling to survive. Business owners and employees who want to work to pay their bills and feed their families can’t.

---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=165A223A1A2911)
---
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| | Yesterday, I spoke at the [Stand Up For Freedom Rally](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=165A223A1A2911). Even Staten Island, which has met every single metric set by Governor Cuomo to reopen, remains shut down. The business who opened and hosted the rally was forced to shut down, received a fine and the owner was warned that he could be taken to jail and have his license revoked if he continued to operate.

Everyday our country is looking more and more like a socialist country.

[We need leaders who will stand up and push back. In Washington, I will continue to fight for our freedoms, work with President Trump to rebuild our economy and restore American jobs. Help me keep fighting!](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=165A223A1A2913)

clean_body: If we don’t begin reopening NYC now, this city will find itself in a severe fiscal crisis that nobody who loves this city wants to see. We must begin to reopen now.... safely and with precaution. | | | | | | | | | Friends- If we don’t begin reopening NYC now, this city will find itself in a severe fiscal crisis that nobody who loves this city wants to see. We must begin to reopen now.... safely and with precaution. Every passing day creates more uncertainty for restaurants, mom & pop shops and other small businesses struggling to survive. Business owners and employees who want to work to pay their bills and feed their families can’t. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Yesterday, I spoke at the . Even Staten Island, which has met every single metric set by Governor Cuomo to reopen, remains shut down. The business who opened and hosted the rally was forced to shut down, received a fine and the owner was warned that he could be taken to jail and have his license revoked if he continued to operate. | |

#
Earlier this week, my Deputy Campaign Manager, Marguerite, reached out to an organization regarding an endorsement. This is standard campaign practice, and we get responses that run the gamut.

We had NEVER gotten a response like this. What's so frustrating here is the dismissiveness from someone with whom we KNOW we share values. We're on the same side! It's part of the reason I got in the race in the first place. Because I am all too aware that**there are some who would look at this race and say "long shot," who wouldn't get invested because the work seems too hard** , the hill too steep to climb, the battle too fraught.
---
| [Chip in to show you aren't afraid of a tough fight](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=70cfc0b4f0&e=140a9b81e7 "Chip in to show you aren't afraid of a tough fight")
---
| But the people who are making assumptions about us aren't doing their homework. They don't know that, over the course of the past eight weeks,**this campaign has caught fire**. We've got Planned Parenthood on our side. We've got endorsements on a list as long as my arm. We've got a groundswell of support from voters, and we've got all of _you_.

One thing this woefully misinformed fellow is right about?**My Republican opponent's coffers are stacked. And we need to raise a significant amount of money to beat him.**

Can you [make a gift today](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=25f5c858a3&e=140a9b81e7) and help us show this naysayer -- and others like him-- that you are willing to take a risk on a campaign you really believe in?

And if you're not a believer yet, please call the campaign at 815-878-4230 and we will set up some time for a call -- I'd love to persuade you.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---

name: Young Kim
subject: The truth is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
This isn't just about one race. It's about returning common sense leadership to California and bringing conservative reforms to Washington. That's why our effort to flip this seat from blue to red is powered by thousands of grassroots conservatives -- not just in California, but across the nation.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zwexL3otHje7wz4dAF6WOWp5m5Jma9eQeBCehn9iWQWzQsJJmz_fjxCU2065V5oEDa4YnHuAmx7WatX2qZBQ0YzDrE7UEFtm3SbYHa8uRxoDQQcfohYKBm4vjKtT8lqCGCNTUIiYwSBJ9SjoohYtBY5-54Ti6Lg6k3tQjpg9Wbj25zDzNYVAW2YCUpEmeWH3uPC1ksTzeLIZ79a-znGApO86QnFA93cbXWHaq6mZtQl9TwORPCFDTOE4YJvjDcTibm9eq-ue3ABQU4hhHWycXTqhOdwdyFzJPEWvUdJK9ZJ0-lD3M4dE89ROazRjZCHBNjHLXHEYhBTBEcx3xOGXzaMTkvNe1PdB2u3JRqT_9ohly0WV85z7VQ==&c=5Dg7pTGp0otHqC3R1wn7wRimtBrLJOH4ioevyrFgnJT-Hvm_WypXvQ==&ch=CrU4PBW5fASGXiEOb5j3bxzk0LS_bfW7ZDAbh3DmdSsMg-p8swdTsA==)

The truth is, Friend, this isn't just about one race. It's about returning common sense leadership to California and bringing conservative reforms to Washington. That's why our effort to flip this seat from blue to red is powered by thousands of grassroots conservatives -- not just in California, but across the nation.

It's fueled by people like you chipping in $5, $10, or even just $1 at a time because they've had enough of Nancy Pelosi's failed socialist agenda.

[**With just two days to go before our next critical campaign deadline, we have to ask: can you pitch in to flip this seat and the House from blue to red?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zwexL3otHje7wz4dAF6WOWp5m5Jma9eQeBCehn9iWQWzQsJJmz_fjxCU2065V5oEDa4YnHuAmx7WatX2qZBQ0YzDrE7UEFtm3SbYHa8uRxoDQQcfohYKBm4vjKtT8lqCGCNTUIiYwSBJ9SjoohYtBY5-54Ti6Lg6k3tQjpg9Wbj25zDzNYVAW2YCUpEmeWH3uPC1ksTzeLIZ79a-znGApO86QnFA93cbXWHaq6mZtQl9TwORPCFDTOE4YJvjDcTibm9eq-ue3ABQU4hhHWycXTqhOdwdyFzJPEWvUdJK9ZJ0-lD3M4dE89ROazRjZCHBNjHLXHEYhBTBEcx3xOGXzaMTkvNe1PdB2u3JRqT_9ohly0WV85z7VQ==&c=5Dg7pTGp0otHqC3R1wn7wRimtBrLJOH4ioevyrFgnJT-Hvm_WypXvQ==&ch=CrU4PBW5fASGXiEOb5j3bxzk0LS_bfW7ZDAbh3DmdSsMg-p8swdTsA==) At moments like these, know that whatever you're able to contribute makes a big difference.

Pelosi is prepared to do whatever it takes to keep us out of this seat, and that's why we need you more than ever, Friend. After winning our primary, this toss-up race is starting to lean in our direction and that means we're a major target.

If we are going to take on our self-funded opponent and win -- we're going to need all the help we can get. Just like in 2018, they're prepared to spend millions against us to keep conservative voices out of office. We have to stop them.

I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important, Friend. [**Can I count on you?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zwexL3otHje7wz4dAF6WOWp5m5Jma9eQeBCehn9iWQWzQsJJmz_fjxCU2065V5oEDa4YnHuAmx7WatX2qZBQ0YzDrE7UEFtm3SbYHa8uRxoDQQcfohYKBm4vjKtT8lqCGCNTUIiYwSBJ9SjoohYtBY5-54Ti6Lg6k3tQjpg9Wbj25zDzNYVAW2YCUpEmeWH3uPC1ksTzeLIZ79a-znGApO86QnFA93cbXWHaq6mZtQl9TwORPCFDTOE4YJvjDcTibm9eq-ue3ABQU4hhHWycXTqhOdwdyFzJPEWvUdJK9ZJ0-lD3M4dE89ROazRjZCHBNjHLXHEYhBTBEcx3xOGXzaMTkvNe1PdB2u3JRqT_9ohly0WV85z7VQ==&c=5Dg7pTGp0otHqC3R1wn7wRimtBrLJOH4ioevyrFgnJT-Hvm_WypXvQ==&ch=CrU4PBW5fASGXiEOb5j3bxzk0LS_bfW7ZDAbh3DmdSsMg-p8swdTsA==)

Thank you,

Young Kim
* * *
_
During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. If you are unable to donate at this time, we could still use your support --__[**endorse Young Kim here!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zwexL3otHje7wz4dAF6WOWp5m5Jma9eQeBCehn9iWQWzQsJJmz_fj6RaeZg_1W0OVrIa5JDvKQ6BB0SkqPAZuWf6K0cTZckRrrh06pURwGOfi5ww-suepSUkdIwfKeSPKdXrduV8XSBqFYeJUNjaPF1Cnm-4suXojSdnL5VpAyb9MdbKvyiYZHtGufBqKHaN0rbFNmm_z25eHIzlwCZ_PExzVE0QTvq5qagMsRubJ2tKXWREAw1j5yemQoHCqwotGTuVcqQ-d3S36ZX1BBqphpdSvodwuJ7FsSTnMP1MbybfBhQ5Jt2jnKcSC8tmyCpFy5HDaS7tjI__NXrdWBNplJrCCIODRgSm&c=5Dg7pTGp0otHqC3R1wn7wRimtBrLJOH4ioevyrFgnJT-Hvm_WypXvQ==&ch=CrU4PBW5fASGXiEOb5j3bxzk0LS_bfW7ZDAbh3DmdSsMg-p8swdTsA==)_

name: MJ Hegar
subject: You're part of a truly kick-ass team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
This team can beat Sen. Cornyn and FLIP THE SENATE.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890031/7f51f7bc/4e132f10/4ef69625/667499679/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, I say this a lot, but I want to say it once more: I'm incredibly grateful for all of your support. **You 're part of a truly kick-ass team.**

I have faith that this team can beat Sen. Cornyn and _FLIP THE SENATE_ in November. Yep, you read that right: _By defeating Sen. Cornyn here in Texas, we 'll be flipping one of the four seats we need to retake the Senate._

But our biggest deadline yet is coming up on Sunday...

**My team has told me that every grassroots donation will be matched 100%, so your gift will go twice as far. If you can, I 'm asking you to pitch in.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890031/7f51f7bc/4e132f10/4ef69619/667499679/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200529.1nd__1476__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890031/7f51f7bc/4e132f10/4ef6961f/667499679/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200529.1nd__1476__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890031/7f51f7bc/4e132f10/4ef6961d/667499679/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200529.1nd__1476__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890031/7f51f7bc/4e132f10/4ef69613/667499679/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200529.1nd__1476__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890031/7f51f7bc/4e132f10/4ef69611/667499679/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200529.1nd__1476__")**
**We all know that Sen. John Cornyn is vulnerable.** We can defeat him and flip the Senate, but we know that it's going to come down to the strength of our grassroots donors vs. Sen. Cornyn's special interest and corporate PAC allies.

Thanks to the efforts of people like you, we've traveled tens of thousands of miles (physically at first, but now virtually), talked to thousands of Texans, and received donations from over 42,000 people.

**Together, we 've put Sen. Cornyn on the defensive.** Now, it's time to show him and his D.C. boss, Mitch McConnell, that we're coming to finish the job in November.

**[Help us hit our biggest deadline yet. Every gift is 100% matched, so now's the time to chip in. Make your first* donation before Sunday. ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890031/7f51f7bc/4e132f10/4ef69610/667499679/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200529.1nd__1476__&amount=10")**

Thanks y'all,
MJ
*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update.

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890031/7f51f7bc/4e132f10/4ef69610/667499679/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200529.1nd__1476__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890031/7f51f7bc/4e132f10/4ef69617/667499679/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1476&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890031/7f51f7bc/4e132f10/4ef69616/667499679/VEsHBQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

name: Blue Georgia
subject: MAJOR news (via Roll Call)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
BREAKING: Kelly Loeffler (R) named one of the most vulnerable senators in the country
| | |
---
**_BREAKING via ROLL CALL :_ Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) joins list of 10 most vulnerable senators, puts GOP majority in real jeopardy **
This is MAJOR, friend.
We just got new polling showing Reverend Warnock (D) in the lead in Georgia's Senate race - and now _Roll Call_ __ has named our Republican opponent one of the most vulnerable senators in the country! **This means we have a REAL shot at flipping this seat and taking back the Senate for Democrats.**
Now, with CNN reporting that the GOP's majority is in "very real jeopardy," Mitch McConnell is throwing his FULL support behind Loeffler to keep this seat red and maintain his iron grip on the Senate.
**If we 're going to flip Georgia blue and retake Senate control, we can't let up this fight - not even for a second. But Loeffler is spending $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to buy this seat, and we're about to fall short of our critical fundraising goal. **
**That 's why we need grassroots supporters like you to rush your urgent support - $5, even $10 - to get us back on track before midnight tonight. Friend, Our last fundraising report ahead of the June 23rd Special Election ends at midnight on June 3rd, and our campaign needs your help to finish with a strong report. [Can we count on you to make a contribution of $10, $25, or $50 right now?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/dThhzTc9Vp1C4S5jzRydlQ/QyrFVzfRgJSqbvtko3w39w) **By chipping in a few dollars now, you can help send Nancy Pelosi a message that conservatives are fired up, ready to win on June 23rd, and ready to take back the House on November 3rd!** With the Election right around the corner, our team is working hard to get our conservative Pro-Trump message out to the voters. But we are counting on grassroots donors like you to help make sure we have the resources necessary to deliver that message on the airwaves and in the mailbox. [By donating even just $5 or $10 today, you can help ensure we get our message out to voters and win on June 23rd.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/dThhzTc9Vp1C4S5jzRydlQ/QyrFVzfRgJSqbvtko3w39w) Sincerely, Chris Jacobs

body:
We want to thank these amazing leaders in our community for joining us in our mission to put #CommunityFirst. [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=c064091f9b6e4b9aadf4d5057c8e2e00&_e=ikExhn08aG-BJKnLBh-BPm7j12GowbU7N7UlGap-hKDYfSVE_CIRF4V5ifWX0E0vJ0Q76aamvkCIH_3WS4uLX8fkFPo96feFz58tTG5C9oKNdDPQRm_fBHt-bPRHJOWNB_yxUxr11fpOGhWe4TD9Bpp1LZWdDtNRIwIdSrFj7USXDCmRr9vwcegZrBymhkIsKHv8G4ksQMxE9OhljMzYkUhDTOz3U0YiQmmq12gMeC1xYloWiJRqZ2-X_y_qUVyxyEvSWlTytOVUN4H-Xqb87Q%3D%3D) Friend, We want to thank these amazing leaders in our community for joining us in our mission to put #CommunityFirst. It is imperative, now more than ever, that we stand together and put the needs of our community above all else. Brian is honored to have their trust and support in our campaign. Click below to watch the video! [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=c064091f9b6e4b9aadf4d5057c8e2e00&_e=ikExhn08aG-BJKnLBh-BPm7j12GowbU7N7UlGap-hKDYfSVE_CIRF4V5ifWX0E0v8JXc0r6mBIPaBVbKHpA4Ol-f1X35jWBJThMLYMcmONmbx1bPW1glRcvVdco1WtfO7ubqAcKXZWi4lW3aWgzbaKDg-QjXuzccBL2Z9wnkIiXT5Y9bkNL00i8ZM8_qb6BUaUMcuDqfREL9ehAI7zsRdpTubBqzjRIq8mN2374CodjSJ_iQJKOmmWkLyvLsDBa51rHYHRFgUZ7stkbsUwpStw%3D%3D) “I’m voting for Brian Fitzpatrick because he continues to put people before politics.” **\- Tommy Tomlinson, Pennsylvania State Senator** “I’m voting for Brian Fitzpatrick because he’s fight for clean water for all of us and gets things done.” **\- Todd Stephens, Pennsylvania State Representative** “I hardily endorse Brian Fitzpatrick and want to see him continue his work as our Member of Congress in Washington DC. He is a big supporter of working men and women. He’s from that kind of background and he understands that most folks get up every day to go to work and they only want the government to give them a fair playing field. That motivates Brian and I think that explains his support for sound measures that boost our economy and support working men and women **\- Mark Schweiker, Former Pennsylvania Governor** “I am voting for Brian Fitzpatrick because he has stood up and supported our first responders throughout his career.” **\- Frank Farry, Pennsylvania State Representative and Fire Chief of the Langhorne-Middletown Fire Company** “I’m supporting Brian Fitzpatrick because he’s an active member of our community and he supports our interests in Washington.” **\- Wendi Thomas, Pennsylvania State Representative** “I’m voting for Brian Fitzpatrick because he works tirelessly on our behalf and he shares our values here in Bucks County” **\- Gene DiGirolamo, Bucks County Commissioner** Thanks, Team Fitzpatrick

Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress

Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
PO Box 939
Langhorne, PA 19047
This email is sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress. To unsubscribe from future emails use this \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

name: Megan West
subject: LIVE interview tonight with Pastor Jack Hibbs
body:
| | Reopening church in California
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k_X0RvXhMvQdikOq1ZHA9nw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200529com01&n=1)
| Peter, Join me tonight, Friday, May 29, at 8:00 PM ET / 5:00 PM PT for a live conversation with Pastor Jack Hibbs, senior pastor of Calvary Chapel Chino Hills in California. **Pastor Hibbs will be reopening Calvary Chapel this coming Sunday, Pentecost Sunday, for the first time since March.** More than 1,200 pastors in California are holding services despite California Governor Newsom choosing not to make churches in California “essential.” We’ll discuss why Pastor Hibbs, and over a thousand other pastors in California, feel led to open their churches at this particular time. And Pastor Hibbs will share the critical role churches play during this challenging time in our nation. This is a conversation relevant to every believer as we seek to respect those in authority over us, honor the health and safety of others, and stand for our First Amendment Rights. I hope you will plan to join us this evening for this important conversation at 8 PM ET / 7 PM CT / 6 PM MT / 5 PM PT LIVE on [Youtube](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k_X0RvXhMvQdikOq1ZHA9nw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200529com01&n=2) and [Facebook](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-z5Dbw6gYGfmc4HcSk8ZZyLnA5IWmOQxpuJBtE7LYcJKw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200529com01&n=3). [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k_X0RvXhMvQdikOq1ZHA9nw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200529com01&n=4) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-z5Dbw6gYGfmc4HcSk8ZZyLFBs01vSpCBBpXFtwkLxosw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200529com01&n=5) See you tonight! **Pray. Think. Vote.** Megan West
Media Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200529com01&n=6) **P.S.** Have you taken action to help #KeepChurchEssential in America? Send a quick email to your governor about this important issue [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FctD9_sg-AXL0miQav9DganSL1Rnhh3BoqPIgmY5hF-gGump7v6TWB_GLi5fGn9VDqYHqo35fLKMP3ZUrcWtQpponA6979oaxF3LO_VIWdY&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200529com01&n=7).

body:
Last week, we told you that we started sending mailers to voters throughout the district. This week, we showed you our first TV ad that just went up on the air. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HwE/ni0YAA/t.326/NKd59uxwQcWJAqa7qo8Zcg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJP5-2BIPY5aF9ZX7ZKoP7dTchla0wWJhiausX9wqB49K4nViBfT4Nn-2Fy097naISyQ-2FG-2FcdE-2FTf50k5vrh0AUP-2BPuVZCvXN9sBjEDnghJOhPFc2YAx4y8uow-2BawNdiTZ3bfYx2vCC2JBM-2FJ4b4oYD-2FrzWXhcvaTBFilDkoxGX7DUPp69VP-2F8KmsA3FZ2w-2Ffp-2F-2Fy4TOw-2FFTYKR6o8qoe-2B6gCZHx5NSXXwo6MYh9betVYrPS62PUmx2n6hn9iMFjikONQEqnBaBZNvf2KU4KDC1T9QVUqUnrX-2BSERVo-2FxLQsWL6fA-3D-3D/J7Ac) Friend, **** **** **** Last week, we told you that we started sending mailers to voters throughout the district. This week, we showed you our first TV ad that just went up on the air. Now, we are also starting to run digital ads on Facebook, YouTube, Instagram, and other platforms to reach voters through social media.
Digital ads are one of the most flexible and cost-effective ways for us to reach voters. We can receive direct feedback on how those ads are performing and adjust our strategy accordingly. But right now, **_we are $15,000 shy of our digital ads budget for the remainder of the campaign_**.
If we can hit our fundraising goal for our digital ads budget, we know we can reach enough voters online to win in June. **_[Will you make a donation today to help us get there?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HwE/ni0YAA/t.326/NKd59uxwQcWJAqa7qo8Zcg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJP5-2BIPY5aF9ZX7ZKoP7dTchla0wWJhiausX9wqB49K4iZF3JAaGAPxkoLPF3BgIpEkK1-2FHnET-2BgxUEZbd9O10-2FbsOJKg57dtfUNwbntFVswWn7pNm1Df-2Fyv7FO9F4gnEO7Xj96JIl51Dn5hYD9fwNpexn3sQ2eQsMCB3fsoH6NIPPlpMv2LgLW9UgxrJ6yWyc9whSJyVQUM03myMVHSGoro-2FSOSePTYkIzgSpT-2FGdG-2BmUm9kqg-2FijRD0U3y4arxUoMpVbwNPrWIEPTDwF55b1ugZl2rG0d-2BZEuakzoYBUGLg-3D-3D/ID1P)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HwE/ni0YAA/t.326/NKd59uxwQcWJAqa7qo8Zcg/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJP5-2BIPY5aF9ZX7ZKoP7dTchla0wWJhiausX9wqB49K4pzrjRzxNXnXI7sEE-2BNnmGQ32dhTspN5pqCp48CKWwDbCWpC1FWCB50QaGfvs4Sut8a89ei-2BBcZMpZDrfIwv6R1A5gVNl-2FaVvalzJLivE-2Balyo2U9JjmScywPhySyTJn1VVh8F2wO8VseebjngUJavWanVjRvTdnBBQ7IEo8p-2F-2FRYGvYfioy5hkXfOqdRuEgdDzv2QBXJNDyme0j87Ti3ddNRq3s6X8838uMuqk0b9Akn-2Bz5O4z56Or19mub1TkLTQ-3D-3D/X3w3)
We are running the most effective, data-driven campaign in this race. We might get outspent by candidates who are self-funding with millions of dollars, but no other campaign can compete with our message and our strategy. **_[With your contribution, we can continue running the best digital operation NY-17 has ever seen.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HwE/ni0YAA/t.326/NKd59uxwQcWJAqa7qo8Zcg/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJP5-2BIPY5aF9ZX7ZKoP7dTchla0wWJhiausX9wqB49K4oDeNnWtjeEZOO4qGobqX54hUGqO4tDE03C2SnIT49Rx-2FMTswJuWM5fl6IDjxlNA6dL48O-2FKBPk9VEAuqp8j4-2FrvceiXujRD777xCBQipgfMT9lgFiL5H5P92lw67frC7aWJVIh2A-2FdoAH1Z8Ii1l8p2r2qNBzQ8gfAbx6VV0S0mzpWWlWuD2WPy-2BYcwvq7c4a4uOoqxnT2-2FiNMsJXCIaWUT-2BASfwBMxNBHKhV5Eb-2F0NR0yvvgSjAQ-2FkU7gHeb6x1g-3D-3D/8xt8)_**

Sending out mail, advertising on TV, and running digital ads are the three crucial components to getting our message out to every Democratic voter in the district. These next few weeks are when voters will really start to tune in, and we need to make sure we have the resources to reach everyone. We know we have the winning message -- we just need your help getting it out there.
Thank you for everything, and let’s win this thing.
Team Mondaire

name: Team Michelle
subject: Did you hear the news?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
It's official, friends!

Michelle is on the ballot for Kansas' 2nd District! That means the race is officially on, and we need grassroots supporters to help keep us on the path to victory.

With just a few days until our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline, we're still falling a little short of our goal.

**[Chip in $10 or more to help us close the gap before our digital fundraising deadline to ensure we have the resources to send Michelle to Congress to fight for us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17674807/202459943/-2120508223?gpsid=8_122_13175&refcode=em20_200529_eom2_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200529_eom2_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDVjZDQzOS1kNmExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpdhPmfC1LC72deT3SdZUcSPXweB3VHMDjBaJzWs2Mc=)**

Thanks,

Team Michelle

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
From: Michelle De La Isla
Subject: It's official
Date: Thurs, May 28, 2020
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

Yesterday, **I officially filed to be on the ballot for Kansas' 2nd District race!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17674810/202459948/-2120508223?gpsid=8_122_13175&refcode=em20_200529_eom2_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200529_eom2_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDVjZDQzOS1kNmExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpdhPmfC1LC72deT3SdZUcSPXweB3VHMDjBaJzWs2Mc=)
When we launched this campaign nearly five months ago, I could never have imagined the support I'd receive. People from every corner of the district have stepped up to join me in advocating for a better Kansas, and I am so grateful to have each and every one of you on this team.

This race is just getting started. Now, more than ever your support will make a difference. We need to reach voters from Marshall County all the way to Cherokee County. More support means we can talk to more voters, we need to use all of our resources to get the word out about our race!

**[Will you chip in before my end-of-month digital fundraising deadline to help ensure I have the resources necessary to flip this seat and go to Congress to fight for you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17674815/202459953/-2120508223?gpsid=8_122_13175&refcode=em20_200529_eom2_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200529_eom2_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDVjZDQzOS1kNmExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpdhPmfC1LC72deT3SdZUcSPXweB3VHMDjBaJzWs2Mc=)**

Friend, we've already accomplished so much together. Last quarter, grassroots supporters like you helped me not only outraise the incumbent -- but the entire GOP field combined! I know if we continue working together, we can win in November and bring real change to our district.

I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money because I want Kansans to know I’m fighting for them and will not be influenced by corporate support. If I’m going to have the resources it takes to win, I need you to give and to spread the word!

**[Chip in $10 or more before Sunday at midnight to help send me to Congress to advocate for all Kansans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17674819/202459957/-2120508223?gpsid=8_122_13175&refcode=em20_200529_eom2_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200529_eom2_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDVjZDQzOS1kNmExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpdhPmfC1LC72deT3SdZUcSPXweB3VHMDjBaJzWs2Mc=)**

Thanks,

Michelle

**Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can.**

clean_body: It's official, friends! Michelle is on the ballot for Kansas' 2nd District! That means the race is officially on, and we need grassroots supporters to help keep us on the path to victory. With just a few days until our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline, we're still falling a little short of our goal. = Thanks, Team Michelle \----------Begin Forwarded Message---------- From: Michelle De La Isla Subject: It's official Date: Thurs, May 28, 2020 Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team. Friends, Yesterday, I officially filed to be on the ballot for Kansas' 2nd District race! = When we launched this campaign nearly five months ago, I could never have imagined the support I'd receive. People from every corner of the district have stepped up to join me in advocating for a better Kansas, and I am so grateful to have each and every one of you on this team. This race is just getting started. Now, more than ever your support will make a difference. We need to reach voters from Marshall County all the way to Cherokee County. More support means we can talk to more voters, we need to use all of our resources to get the word out about our race! = Friend, we've already accomplished so much together. Last quarter, grassroots supporters like you helped me not only outraise the incumbent -- but the entire GOP field combined! I know if we continue working together, we can win in November and bring real change to our district. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money because I want Kansans to know I’m fighting for them and will not be influenced by corporate support. If I’m going to have the resources it takes to win, I need you to give and to spread the word! = Thanks, Michelle Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can. = PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS Michelle for Kansas PO Box 67101 Topeka, KS 66667 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

For the first time in Lindsey's career, we have a REAL chance to send Trump's loyal lapdog packing! We 're facing a huge end-of-month fundraising deadline -- and we need to raise $100,000 to seal the deal and send Lindsey HOME. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" "" We're so EXCITED! South Carolina is one of the four flips we need to take back the Senate. And we 're so close we can almost taste it! But Peter, polling like this doesn 't happen overnight. | A Message from Matt!
---
Memorial Day has come and gone and summer is here in New Hampshire! To celebrate we have several great house parties and fundraisers coming up in June throughout the state. Information can be found at the bottom of this newsletter. We've also been very busy over the past few weeks. We announced the endorsement of former Chair of the House Committee on Homeland Security, [Congressman Pete King](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDMxOTAzMDc1MTMxNDYzMDcwJmM9dTJyNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTMxNjAxMzAmZD10OHQ5cTR1.2d6XPddyjiv4caYX8d4fUi1fCo8tvlIRqkeYbwu868Q) and released our [first radio ad](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDMxOTAzMDc1MTMxNDYzMDcwJmM9dTJyNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTMxNjAxOTQmZD13M2c2eTJj.x0VbZ5YUlXEIQs3b9gdx9yRbvVOpJX6OiFEBHtF-HN8) about the importance of New Hampshire electing its first Veteran to Congress in 20 years. I can't wait to see all of you out in the summer sunshine on the campaign trail! Thank you, \- Matt

Matt Mayberry, a Republican candidate for the 1st Congressional District seat, has been endorsed by longtime associate U.S. Rep. subject: Women deserve better than this
body:
I need your help to fight back against this vulgar attack. | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

There’s no bar of decency that my opponent and his supporters won’t slither under. This graphic that they’ve put out reflects their depravity; it shows who they are; it tells you what you need to know about their preferred candidate, and [I need your support to fight back.](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=d04ec97250&e=c1dbff800f)

---
|
---
|
**Women deserve better than this. Those who’ve struggled with mental health issues and had the courage to speak out deserve better than this. And, yes, I deserve better than this. I need YOUR support.**

---
| [DONATE](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=c555d43b70&e=c1dbff800f "DONATE")
---
| I have served my community for decades. I have given voice to our most vulnerable. And I have stood courageously for conservative principles as a Georgia legislator. Throughout that time, I’ve also had my struggles, and I’ve talked openly about those because I know so many others have gone through those same tough times and need to know they’re not alone.
---
|
I need YOU to stand with me. [Rush >> $100](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=719b25784d&e=c1dbff800f)

Thank you for your support! I am proud to have you with me in this fight.

-Renee

name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: Repeating "Black Lives Matter" is Not Enough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/tndp-long-%20fo%20newsletter.jpg]
Dear Peter,
Black Lives Matter. It is with hearts heavy with sadness that we send our love to George Floyd's family, friends, and community. The senseless killing of black men and women, and the racism behind these acts, is a plague on this country.
Black Lives Matter. But repeating these words it is not enough. And, after the horrific events in Minneapolis and the senseless killing of yet another black man, many of you are saying, "what can we DO?"
Black Lives Matter. First, the Tennessee Democratic Party will continue to work to elect candidates who will fight for freedom, equality, and justice, for all - no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, how you pray, or who you love. What you can do is find the candidate near you who shares these values and help to elect them. Elections and voting matters because it matters who leads in times of crisis and fundamental change.
Black Lives Matter. What you can also do, especially if you are a white ally, is to step back, stop, and listen. Find the black (or other minority-led) organization(s) in your community who are on the ground organizing and taking action on issues of racism, inquality, and injustice. Find the leaders of these organizations and then allow them to tell you what they need you to do to help. Then listen.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
VACCINE, CURE, & PREVENTION
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/bishop%20stephen%20charleston.png]
THEME OF THE WEEK: FACTS
The theme of this week is facts: Twitter began fact checking President Donald Trump [https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2020/05/26/trump-twitter-label-fact-check/] , Republicans in Nashville ignored facts about gun violence, [https://wreg.com/news/bill-to-carry-guns-without-permit-passes-tennessee-house-committee-vote-despite-pleas-from-memphis-leaders/] and Democrats advocated on behalf of facts about the economy and healthcare in Tennessee. [https://medium.com/@TNSenateDems/democrats-announce-budget-framework-to-invest-in-tennessees-recovery-health-and-future-40f8ea53ffe5]
The Tennessee General Assembly came back this week after a recess during COVID19, and rather than address the pandemic and the jaw dropping statistics of the harm it placed on Tennesseeans, here is a list of what the Republican Supermajority decided to focus on:
*
Removed
gun
permitting
laws
even
after
the
pleas
of
law
enforcement
*
Pushed
open
gun
carry
on
college
campuses
*
Limited
women's
reproductive
rights
*
Attacked
teenage
students
*
Routed
money
away
from
Tennessee
public
schools
Over half a million unemployed Tennesseans, hundreds dead, and thousands sick, yet Republicans are pushing their slate of hate rather than addressing the crisis at hand. If Republicans truly cared about serving Tennesseans they would work to save lives and restore the econonmy.
Republicans must work with Democrats to:
*
Ensure
medical
treatment
for
people
who
don’t
have
health
insurance
*
Protect
lives
in
the
wake
of
the
COVID
19
Pandemic
*
Provide
necessary
relief
for
the
over
500,000
unemployed
*
Expand
access
to
absentee
ballots
to
keep
you
safe
when
you
vote
Republicans can continue to ignore facts or they can work with Democrats to serve the people of Tennessee. We hope and pray its the latter and if it's not, November is coming.
Fact checking with you,
TWEETS OF THE WEEK
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/2020-05-29%20at%201.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/2020-05-29%20at%202.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/2020-05-29%20at%203.png]
TAKE ACTION: ADVOCATE FOR
NO-EXCUSE ABSENTEE BALLOTS
"Action to safeguard our electoral system cannot wait. In a matter of weeks, millions of Americans across several states will be asked to vote in municipal and primary elections, and they deserve better than the impossible choice between preserving their well-being and casting their ballots." - TNDP chair, Mary Mancini
No Tennessean should ever have to choose between protecting their family or casting their vote. The Tennessee General Assembly had six different opportunities to pass legislation to protect voters before they recessed last month. The Republican supermajority voted everything down.
Now, they are back in session and every indication is that they will continue to vote down all efforts to relax restrictions on absentee ballots.
Sign the petition now! [https://tndp.org/universal-ballot-petition/]
The COVID-19 pandemic poses a new threat to elections across Tennessee. But Tennessee has the ability to ensure Tennesseans don’t have to choose between exercising their right to vote or working at the polls and protecting their health. We need your help.
Here are some other actions you can take:
*
Find
your
legislator.
[http://wapp.capitol.tn.gov/Apps/fmlv3/districts.aspx]
*
Call
your
legislator.
[https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RImECkvDyRsyunMF6BeZ9dll9Nc4b0JmGKuThyPaM6k/edit]
*
Write
a
letter
to
your
legislator
using
TNDP's
letter

Mary and Emily answered tough questions and had some laughs with people across the state. Learn more about our party's priority for the year, what it means to be a battleground state, and hibiscus La Croix. [https://www.facebook.com/watch/live/?v=531138994248358&ref=watch_permalink]
Cocktails and Questions is weekly happy hour, happens every Thursday at 4:00 pm CT/ 5:00 pm ET on Facebook live. Each week we sit down with Democratic candidates on the 2020 ballot to discuss current issues, their platform, and their campaigns.
WE NEED YOUR HELP
Here's the reality: Because of the COVID-19 emergency, the Tennessee Democratic Party's resources are stretched thin. Given how this crisis will impact our economy, we are expecting a significant loss of revenue in the coming months which will impact our ability to win elections up and down the ballot this fall. Our staff, our offices, our voter protection and get out the vote program, outreach programs, and our organizing capabilities all are depending on the resources we can raise right now.
We need you in this fight alongside us! Your generosity enables us to build the grassroots movement and party infrastructure needed to elect Democrats from city hall to the White House in 2020. THANK YOU!
