clean_body: [] Dear Peter, Black Lives Matter. It is with hearts heavy with sadness that we send our love to George Floyd's family, friends, and community. The senseless killing of black men and women, and the racism behind these acts, is a plague on this country. Black Lives Matter. But repeating these words it is not enough. And, after the horrific events in Minneapolis and the senseless killing of yet another black man, many of you are saying, "what can we DO?" Black Lives Matter. First, the Tennessee Democratic Party will continue to work to elect candidates who will fight for freedom, equality, and justice, for all - no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, how you pray, or who you love. What you can do is find the candidate near you who shares these values and help to elect them. Elections and voting matters because it matters who leads in times of crisis and fundamental change. Black Lives Matter. What you can also do, especially if you are a white ally, is to step back, stop, and listen. Find the black (or other minority-led) organization(s) in your community who are on the ground organizing and taking action on issues of racism, inquality, and injustice. Find the leaders of these organizations and then allow them to tell you what they need you to do to help. Then listen. [] Mary Mancini Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party VACCINE, CURE, & PREVENTION [] THEME OF THE WEEK: FACTS The theme of this week is facts: Twitter began fact checking President Donald Trump [] , Republicans in Nashville ignored facts about gun violence, [] and Democrats advocated on behalf of facts about the economy and healthcare in Tennessee. [] The Tennessee General Assembly came back this week after a recess during COVID19, and rather than address the pandemic and the jaw dropping statistics of the harm it placed on Tennesseeans, here is a list of what the Republican Supermajority decided to focus on: Removed gun permitting laws even after the pleas of law enforcement Pushed open gun carry on college campuses Limited women's reproductive rights Attacked teenage students Routed money away from Tennessee public schools Over half a million unemployed Tennesseans, hundreds dead, and thousands sick, yet Republicans are pushing their slate of hate rather than addressing the crisis at hand. If Republicans truly cared about serving Tennesseans they would work to save lives and restore the econonmy. Republicans must work with Democrats to: Ensure medical treatment for people who don’t have health insurance Protect lives in the wake of the COVID 19 Pandemic Provide necessary relief for the over 500,000 unemployed Expand access to absentee ballots to keep you safe when you vote Republicans can continue to ignore facts or they can work with Democrats to serve the people of Tennessee. We hope and pray its the latter and if it's not, November is coming. Fact checking with you, TWEETS OF THE WEEK [] [] [] TAKE ACTION: ADVOCATE FOR NO-EXCUSE ABSENTEE BALLOTS "Action to safeguard our electoral system cannot wait. In a matter of weeks, millions of Americans across several states will be asked to vote in municipal and primary elections, and they deserve better than the impossible choice between preserving their well-being and casting their ballots." - TNDP chair, Mary Mancini No Tennessean should ever have to choose between protecting their family or casting their vote. The Tennessee General Assembly had six different opportunities to pass legislation to protect voters before they recessed last month. The Republican supermajority voted everything down. Now, they are back in session and every indication is that they will continue to vote down all efforts to relax restrictions on absentee ballots. Sign the petition now! [] The COVID-19 pandemic poses a new threat to elections across Tennessee. But Tennessee has the ability to ensure Tennesseans don’t have to choose between exercising their right to vote or working at the polls and protecting their health. We need your help. Here are some other actions you can take: Find your legislator. [] Call your legislator. [] Write a letter to your legislator using TNDP's letter sample. [] Write a letter to your newspaper's local editor. Use this sample. [] Share on social media. COCKTAILS AND QUESTIONS WITH TNDP CHAIRWOMAN MARY MANCINI AND TNDP COMMUNICATIONS DIRECTOR EMILY CUPPLES [] Due to a last minute scheduling change, this week's Cocktails and Questions was a sit down with TNDP Chairwoman Mary Mancini and TNDP Communications Director Emily Cupples. Mary and Emily answered tough questions and had some laughs with people across the state. Learn more about our party's priority for the year, what it means to be a battleground state, and hibiscus La Croix. [] Cocktails and Questions is weekly happy hour, happens every Thursday at 4:00 pm CT/ 5:00 pm ET on Facebook live. Each week we sit down with Democratic candidates on the 2020 ballot to discuss current issues, their platform, and their campaigns. WE NEED YOUR HELP Here's the reality: Because of the COVID-19 emergency, the Tennessee Democratic Party's resources are stretched thin. Given how this crisis will impact our economy, we are expecting a significant loss of revenue in the coming months which will impact our ability to win elections up and down the ballot this fall. Our staff, our offices, our voter protection and get out the vote program, outreach programs, and our organizing capabilities all are depending on the resources we can raise right now. We need you in this fight alongside us! Your generosity enables us to build the grassroots movement and party infrastructure needed to elect Democrats from city hall to the White House in 2020. name: John Cornyn
subject: have you done all you can?
body:
Friend, Before we know it, the clock will strike zero. Our May fundraising deadline will pass.
As soon as our numbers are final, Democrats here in Texas and around the country will begin to circle like sharks.
They'll be looking for any sign of weakness.
And if they find it, they will immediately begin their attack.
We can't give them any fuel to fire up their efforts to flip Texas blue.
As we stand right now, we need 300 additional Texans to step up and chip in if we stand any chance.
**[Friend, I need one of those people to be you.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Iiz0vpQHmRsYxMjE5Cm5kIdUjRPHJ6njrMNKEiDCFQjoK62OwmBzsYE5-0yWPSvizh-DlKiD7MN5zhKoDJDPlIg23rn4-94Fq_Y8Im57PAK0EYcUjHNejlfGkJDIjuoWtWNpjrC76ID9WeZCjm5eRTOdYbhnXuInllMc0Xot3cSIL7pNmfH-SXfWs-MDZm05Z1QejMyRnFTe8AD-pAJFh3u8kxChppUGuA4_2nK-4t5U026kOwniFyJDpWUp_tb3hUev3Dw61hMGVAZD9p6JvTEI24ix-kMVbnaCFXYQSNL1wFZMsAYbM2CAoqi7ohW8TOBcBwqqnD0YmN_i5Foezw==&c=tKwmycc29ss81PDTbisYDyCfNLWm0YrR-SwJ2GQddNRgyF8LsV9aBQ==&ch=AWSrU6NkiZF07rlOdwjLUwDNICF_0x47KEcRnoiA2-6weagiKzW_LA==)** **May Fundraising Deadline** Goal: **SHORT** [**KEEP TEXAS RED**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Iiz0vpQHmRsYxMjE5Cm5kIdUjRPHJ6njrMNKEiDCFQjoK62OwmBzsYE5-0yWPSvizh-DlKiD7MN5zhKoDJDPlIg23rn4-94Fq_Y8Im57PAK0EYcUjHNejlfGkJDIjuoWtWNpjrC76ID9WeZCjm5eRTOdYbhnXuInllMc0Xot3cSIL7pNmfH-SXfWs-MDZm05Z1QejMyRnFTe8AD-pAJFh3u8kxChppUGuA4_2nK-4t5U026kOwniFyJDpWUp_tb3hUev3Dw61hMGVAZD9p6JvTEI24ix-kMVbnaCFXYQSNL1wFZMsAYbM2CAoqi7ohW8TOBcBwqqnD1R6ygeAizZSg==&c=tKwmycc29ss81PDTbisYDyCfNLWm0YrR-SwJ2GQddNRgyF8LsV9aBQ==&ch=AWSrU6NkiZF07rlOdwjLUwDNICF_0x47KEcRnoiA2-6weagiKzW_LA==) Once we move on to June and we either hit or miss our goal, I want you to ask yourself one question.
**[Did you do everything you can to keep Texas red?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Iiz0vpQHmRsYxMjE5Cm5kIdUjRPHJ6njrMNKEiDCFQjoK62OwmBzsYE5-0yWPSvizh-DlKiD7MN5zhKoDJDPlIg23rn4-94Fq_Y8Im57PAK0EYcUjHNejlfGkJDIjuoWtWNpjrC76ID9WeZCjm5eRTOdYbhnXuInllMc0Xot3cSIL7pNmfH-SXfWs-MDZm05Z1QejMyRnFTe8AD-pAJFh3u8kxChppUGuA4_2nK-4t5U026kOwniFyJDpWUp_tb3hUev3Dw61hMGVAZD9p6JvTEI24ix-kMVbnaCFXYQSNL1wFZMsAYbM2CAoqi7ohW8TOBcBwqqnD244aM4Um6bRw==&c=tKwmycc29ss81PDTbisYDyCfNLWm0YrR-SwJ2GQddNRgyF8LsV9aBQ==&ch=AWSrU6NkiZF07rlOdwjLUwDNICF_0x47KEcRnoiA2-6weagiKzW_LA==)**
Did you do everything you can to keep our great state out of the hands of left-wing radicals?
If the answer is no, your time is now.
\- John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Iiz0vpQHmRsYxMjE5Cm5kIdUjRPHJ6njrMNKEiDCFQjoK62OwmBzsUaYY81sF7b0QzChjtF8HQI-OpgRp5mDSVuR8SJGpJTab8zJ4OriRsRBDXylZ--zIbwBdr3GBCS-rUzetqXz0PxFq_USDcEscGJRR0euhDQbHMAlEZq0A20=&c=tKwmycc29ss81PDTbisYDyCfNLWm0YrR-SwJ2GQddNRgyF8LsV9aBQ==&ch=AWSrU6NkiZF07rlOdwjLUwDNICF_0x47KEcRnoiA2-6weagiKzW_LA==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Iiz0vpQHmRsYxMjE5Cm5kIdUjRPHJ6njrMNKEiDCFQjoK62OwmBzsVparh5oh-rwkTcqvGBOvI0zKfLqZilwvwRcubMJw0j9AQcOCKZutYGMoLYqEpSGNIQDkxaBjMrYedOxyOYwPa4qAh73T-7qa2rm9Jhqh7p9&c=tKwmycc29ss81PDTbisYDyCfNLWm0YrR-SwJ2GQddNRgyF8LsV9aBQ==&ch=AWSrU6NkiZF07rlOdwjLUwDNICF_0x47KEcRnoiA2-6weagiKzW_LA==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Iiz0vpQHmRsYxMjE5Cm5kIdUjRPHJ6njrMNKEiDCFQjoK62OwmBzsUaYY81sF7b0dO5GCLbz1g7GjMbrGU6S2rfzSE8qGt0z8i-eELaYzCNmeiAZIUzD7TTFi1nYZcFSUdrjxCmQEk3-j-L6XXIF2H4siXN1WCpaeRJqnq3Whq6jdgTezrhokQ==&c=tKwmycc29ss81PDTbisYDyCfNLWm0YrR-SwJ2GQddNRgyF8LsV9aBQ==&ch=AWSrU6NkiZF07rlOdwjLUwDNICF_0x47KEcRnoiA2-6weagiKzW_LA==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Iiz0vpQHmRsYxMjE5Cm5kIdUjRPHJ6njrMNKEiDCFQjoK62OwmBzsXCrwvFe32cN1pll7o4E-WdRNnc8rWsXFCgch4sowV-QKQOaQjbEU4331JB_l_DGt-lPLoafxjq30kbqTHAIZvcBT_Tbj5M9KW7aT5TfdfwCU4jYv1KwC0Oo11Ii535UjeijKWoE9u2zkHIJLJDlq3Tq7t0w3BU7vGGpP7XXL9g-NGosURvD8LiTfDwkKysR_3F4cFuGs96v7qZwx_NMBvRijOqAt91o2mv33q4SbRYwi9Tza3tK4GTDyTR_yfSprA==&c=tKwmycc29ss81PDTbisYDyCfNLWm0YrR-SwJ2GQddNRgyF8LsV9aBQ==&ch=AWSrU6NkiZF07rlOdwjLUwDNICF_0x47KEcRnoiA2-6weagiKzW_LA==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax deductible.

**Arizona is _THE_ tipping point state and if we put enough resources into driving turnout here, we could increase our majority in the House, win back the Senate, and defeat Donald Trump. **

**Since top political analysts think Trump could win reelection, our only line of defense will be expanding our majority in the House.**

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Unsettling news…

body:
I'll cut to the chase -- Nancy Pelosi is barreling ahead in the fundraising race. Her Liberal donors are desperate to destroy President Trump's America First agenda. And believe me, Conservatives could really use your help right now. Our end of month deadline is closing in... and we're short of where we need to be. I've never seen Liberal donors drop this much cash to defeat us. They've given $141 MILLION online.
Friend,
I'll cut to the chase -- Nancy Pelosi is barreling ahead in the fundraising race. Her Liberal donors are desperate to destroy President Trump's America First agenda. And believe me, Conservatives could really [**use your help right now.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PakiQrWGzK3HVn2Zt9jqutip2IUiwVaJLiwNSA-eOhw3U-DWYHjmN9xVIoE_mXxQSoXENhrz9Oz8ebMdk9yp61HXY6kAlRPEYKoAbX7KTSsbU1Zv6Z4Gev_YXYFqyXzqntJONa0h_58jf30sZbfLhXbqeF8OepYpeQNGOG9XF-_awxNQLUkwJ9qMrQlI3GlkeuXy7Oklr0jbdOusq1eak_JDif7wwOP0Qn0YOZILZ0Gffpm8NEjwv3U5ay2-O_WmuRkl75nkcWzdOp_RIFfTp7v9MwLr4lwuMt7YdFl206enFpRFB1pNI0lkz_j32AyqwmVsT3dG8X3bMPW1Kp-4B64FbM5zoIdqYqU3TVAgQ8ICRT8n6RIhBMnuSRFtXipMyInrGBoCcvfoJfngxt9WIA==&c=nErrykqweFRhQoPlZbfx2Urlci2O7GU8a3R8F_AEV5N8W8_U4bqUsQ==&ch=QvyhmwwJwcq-z8hn5J4CaZ2re86p8LZUbuhfgvabWku19uHP9k_XrA==) **Our end of month deadline is closing in ... and we're short of where we need to be.**
I've never seen Liberal donors drop this much cash to defeat us. They've given $141 MILLION online. That's enough to put our Conservative allies at a major disadvantage.
Luckily, we have Patriots like you standing alongside the President and his allies.
[**I 'm personally asking you to stand with us now.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PakiQrWGzK3HVn2Zt9jqutip2IUiwVaJLiwNSA-eOhw3U-DWYHjmN9xVIoE_mXxQSoXENhrz9Oz8ebMdk9yp61HXY6kAlRPEYKoAbX7KTSsbU1Zv6Z4Gev_YXYFqyXzqntJONa0h_58jf30sZbfLhXbqeF8OepYpeQNGOG9XF-_awxNQLUkwJ9qMrQlI3GlkeuXy7Oklr0jbdOusq1eak_JDif7wwOP0Qn0YOZILZ0Gffpm8NEjwv3U5ay2-O_WmuRkl75nkcWzdOp_RIFfTp7v9MwLr4lwuMt7YdFl206enFpRFB1pNI0lkz_j32AyqwmVsT3dG8X3bMPW1Kp-4B64FbM5zoIdqYqU3TVAgQ8ICRT8n6RIhBMnuSRFtXipMyInrGBoCcvfoJfngxt9WIA==&c=nErrykqweFRhQoPlZbfx2Urlci2O7GU8a3R8F_AEV5N8W8_U4bqUsQ==&ch=QvyhmwwJwcq-z8hn5J4CaZ2re86p8LZUbuhfgvabWku19uHP9k_XrA==) I'm teaming up with my friend, Robert Aderholt to rally 2,000 more Patriots to contribute before the biggest fundraising deadline of the year. Are you in?
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PakiQrWGzK3HVn2Zt9jqutip2IUiwVaJLiwNSA-eOhw3U-DWYHjmN9xVIoE_mXxQSoXENhrz9Oz8ebMdk9yp61HXY6kAlRPEYKoAbX7KTSsbU1Zv6Z4Gev_YXYFqyXzqntJONa0h_58jf30sZbfLhXbqeF8OepYpeQNGOG9XF-_awxNQLUkwJ9qMrQlI3GlkeuXy7Oklr0jbdOusq1eak_JDif7wwOP0Qn0YOZILZ0Gffpm8NEjwv3U5ay2-O_WmuRkl75nkcWzdOp_RIFfTp7v9MwLr4lwuMt7YdFl206enFpRFB1pNI0lkz_j32AyqwmVsT3dG8X3bMPW1Kp-4B64FbM5zoIdqYqU3TVAgQ8ICRT8n6RIhBMnuSRFtXipMyInrGBoCcvfoJfngxt9WIA==&c=nErrykqweFRhQoPlZbfx2Urlci2O7GU8a3R8F_AEV5N8W8_U4bqUsQ==&ch=QvyhmwwJwcq-z8hn5J4CaZ2re86p8LZUbuhfgvabWku19uHP9k_XrA==)
**[Stand With Us](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PakiQrWGzK3HVn2Zt9jqutip2IUiwVaJLiwNSA-eOhw3U-DWYHjmN9xVIoE_mXxQSoXENhrz9Oz8ebMdk9yp61HXY6kAlRPEYKoAbX7KTSsbU1Zv6Z4Gev_YXYFqyXzqntJONa0h_58jf30sZbfLhXbqeF8OepYpeQNGOG9XF-_awxNQLUkwJ9qMrQlI3GlkeuXy7Oklr0jbdOusq1eak_JDif7wwOP0Qn0YOZILZ0Gffpm8NEjwv3U5ay2-O_WmuRkl75nkcWzdOp_RIFfTp7v9MwLr4lwuMt7YdFl206enFpRFB1pNI0lkz_j32AyqwmVsT3dG8X3bMPW1Kp-4B64FbM5zoIdqYqU3TVAgQ8ICRT8n6RIhBMnuSRFtXipMyInrGBoCcvfoJfngxt9WIA==&c=nErrykqweFRhQoPlZbfx2Urlci2O7GU8a3R8F_AEV5N8W8_U4bqUsQ==&ch=QvyhmwwJwcq-z8hn5J4CaZ2re86p8LZUbuhfgvabWku19uHP9k_XrA==)**
The only way to defeat Nancy Pelosi and her anti-Trump donors is with a surge of grassroots support.
**We 're out of time and the President is counting on us.**
Please, Friend, any amount helps. We need 2,000 Patriots to stand with us. This deadline is just too important to miss.
[**We need YOU in this fight!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PakiQrWGzK3HVn2Zt9jqutip2IUiwVaJLiwNSA-eOhw3U-DWYHjmN9xVIoE_mXxQSoXENhrz9Oz8ebMdk9yp61HXY6kAlRPEYKoAbX7KTSsbU1Zv6Z4Gev_YXYFqyXzqntJONa0h_58jf30sZbfLhXbqeF8OepYpeQNGOG9XF-_awxNQLUkwJ9qMrQlI3GlkeuXy7Oklr0jbdOusq1eak_JDif7wwOP0Qn0YOZILZ0Gffpm8NEjwv3U5ay2-O_WmuRkl75nkcWzdOp_RIFfTp7v9MwLr4lwuMt7YdFl206enFpRFB1pNI0lkz_j32AyqwmVsT3dG8X3bMPW1Kp-4B64FbM5zoIdqYqU3TVAgQ8ICRT8n6RIhBMnuSRFtXipMyInrGBoCcvfoJfngxt9WIA==&c=nErrykqweFRhQoPlZbfx2Urlci2O7GU8a3R8F_AEV5N8W8_U4bqUsQ==&ch=QvyhmwwJwcq-z8hn5J4CaZ2re86p8LZUbuhfgvabWku19uHP9k_XrA==)

Steve Scalise
Republican Whip

clean_body: = | Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. We’ll be brief, team: We’re $7,148 short of our fundraising goal, = | Sri 2020 May Fundraising Time left to meet our goal: Two days How much is left to meet our goal:$7,148 We need your help to cross the finish line. | = | = ---|--- = | = = Hi Team, The money we raise by the end of May will be critical to maintaining and improving the infrastructure we’ve developed to win this race. body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **-May 29, 2020-** **-The 2020 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner-** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17677455/202505430/-1853952297?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTYwYzNmZi1lNmExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjv8AX94CWuJKWlo19FlV9jaVQB3LWVOFeD_clzez2A=&emci=5650e39e-b7a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=e160c3ff-e6a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535) We're taking our [Hoosier Hospitality Dinner](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17677456/202505431/-1853952297?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTYwYzNmZi1lNmExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjv8AX94CWuJKWlo19FlV9jaVQB3LWVOFeD_clzez2A=&emci=5650e39e-b7a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=e160c3ff-e6a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535) online and we want you to come with us! This year, Democrats can take back the Oval Office, keep the majority in the U.S. House, elect a Democratic governor, flip the attorney general's seat, break the supermajority in the Indiana General Assembly and win local elections across the state. But first, we need to come together and get to work. That's why we're hoping you'll join us at the [2020 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17677457/202505432/-1853952297?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTYwYzNmZi1lNmExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjv8AX94CWuJKWlo19FlV9jaVQB3LWVOFeD_clzez2A=&emci=5650e39e-b7a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=e160c3ff-e6a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535). This is an exclusive offer to hear from Democrats across the country. Plus, this year's speaker will be DCCC chair, Illinois Congresswoman Cheri Bustos! Cheri made history as the first woman elected to Congress in her district. Now, she's joining us in the fight to take back our nation in 2020. You won't want to miss this! clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | -May 29, 2020- -The 2020 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner- We're taking our online and we want you to come with us! This year, Democrats can take back the Oval Office, keep the majority in the U.S. House, elect a Democratic governor, flip the attorney general's seat, break the supermajority in the Indiana General Assembly and win local elections across the state. But first, we need to come together and get to work. That's why we're hoping you'll join us at the . This is an exclusive offer to hear from Democrats across the country. Plus, this year's speaker will be DCCC chair, Illinois Congresswoman Cheri Bustos! Cheri made history as the first woman elected to Congress in her district. Now, she's joining us in the fight to take back our nation in 2020. You won't want to miss this! More info and tickets . -The 2020 Convention Preview Broadcast- ** We're partnering with WISH-TV to provide an unprecedented opportunity to connect Hoosier Democrats around the state! The 2020 Convention Preview broadcast will allow Hoosier Democrats and Convention delegates to hear from our candidates while they are mailing back their ballots. You can watch our broadcast on at 5:30 PM EST on June 4! -Hoosiers continue to wait on unemployment benefits- In the wake of COVID-19, hundreds of thousands of Hoosiers have filed for unemployment but they still haven't received the assistance they need. Hoosiers calling the Department of Workforce Development have had to deal with being on only to have their calls dropped or sent to an . Many have waited for with no promise of how they're going to put food on the table or pay their rent. Hoosiers need financial protection now more than ever and the Holcomb administration is letting them down. -The Holcomb administration fails nursing home residents- Nursing home deaths make up a staggering = of COVID-19 related deaths in our state. As a result, the federal government has stressed the need for more in long-term care facilities. As more and more governors step up for nursing home residents, Holcomb continues to drag his feet. Several other states have implemented at nursing homes. Yet, Holcomb has failed to provide widespread = for the staff and residents of nursing homes. He also does not require nursing homes to report which facilities are =. His lack of concern for long-term care facilities has rendered the spread of COVID-19 far more difficult to track among one of our most vulnerable communities. Not to mention, nursing home residents and their families are kept in the dark on the status of their facility. -Trump puts politics over public health- Last week, President Trump threatened to withhold federal funding from states expanding mail-in and absentee voting during the pandemic. In the last few days, the coronavirus death toll passed 100,000 in the U.S. Voting by mail is the only way we can protect people from COVID-19 while maintaining their right to vote. Trump , so why is he so vehemently against it for the American people? In Indiana, the number of people requesting vote-by-mail applications in 2020 was more than of Hoosiers voting by mail in 2016. Three in every five applications were for . When voting is accessible, turnout is high. And when turnout is high, Republicans lose out. President Trump would rather put Americans' health at risk than give even the perception of expanded voting rights. And it's all so he can keep us from voting him out. -Resources- Did you apply to vote by mail? Have questions on getting your ballot in? Read our short on everything you need to know about getting your ballot in before it's too late! Looking for ways to receive or provide COVID-19 relief? We have created a running list of across our state . -Save the date- Cass County Dems: \- Every Saturday, 9-10 AM EST, Virtual. Marion County Democratic Party: \- May 30, 1-3 PM EST, Virtual. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17677699/202508829/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDYwZWZkNC1lN2ExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UP8dbYjnXgKIhkefM9c6icCKN9NQ1d7DgCSWTWwfNI=&emci=db2b5349-e6a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=dd60efd4-e7a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
Friend -- my opponent and the super PAC aligned with her campaign spent millions of dollars trying to defeat me in the March primary.

**In addition, a nameless super PAC (likely the same one aligned with my opponent) spent hundreds of thousands on illegal and unmarked mailers promoting a Republican candidate in our race. It was a shrewd attempt to manipulate the vote count and box me out of the General Election.**

We were outspent 4:1. But we outperformed expectations and made it to the General Election anyway. That's because supporters like you stood with us every step of the way:

**[Sunday marks our end-of-month fundraising deadline and we set a goal of generating 1,500 online donations to help us keep pace with our opponents’ spending. Can I count on you to contribute $3 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17677701/202508831/1147193815?refcode=em-200529-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDYwZWZkNC1lN2ExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UP8dbYjnXgKIhkefM9c6icCKN9NQ1d7DgCSWTWwfNI=)**

**We're building an unprecedented coalition in CA-53.**

Labor unions, environmental groups, the California Democratic Party, local elected leaders, even leading Democrats like Senators Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren are unifying behind our campaign.

The truth is, we’re never going to compete in the money chase with our self-funding opponent and her super PAC. I still have a good feeling that our grassroots momentum can overcome her millions, but that’s impossible unless we must meet our own internal goals:

**[I’m asking personally. Will you make a $3 contribution to my campaign for Congress? Help me send a message that we're ready to overcome the odds and advance real progressive change in CA-53.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17677702/202508832/1147193815?refcode=em-200529-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDYwZWZkNC1lN2ExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UP8dbYjnXgKIhkefM9c6icCKN9NQ1d7DgCSWTWwfNI=)

_Georgette Gómez_

body:
I want to tell you a little bit about one of the most exciting Democratic House candidates this cycle, Eugene DePasquale running in Pennsylvania’s 10th district.
_We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Friend,

**I want to tell you a little bit about one of the most exciting Democratic House candidates this cycle, Eugene DePasquale running in Pennsylvania’s 10th district.**

Eugene has dedicated his career as a public servant to fighting for working people, seniors, and the most vulnerable in his community. As Pennsylvania’s Auditor General, he demanded thousands of untested rape kits be processed, protected children from abuse, and saved taxpayers millions of dollars by uncovering wasteful spending at all levels of government.

[**Now, he’s taking the fight to Congress, and I’m personally asking you to chip in to his campaign to help him get there. Eugene has a big end-of-month deadline in just a few days, so anything you can chip in -- even just a few dollars -- will go a long way towards showing just how much momentum his campaign has.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17678042/202516104/884987243?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.29_b1_as_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjY5YjJlNS1lOWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OwEjdWDQw4q2VDPb2qsb6vvjReobqfHz9TTHNSDXg90=)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Keep the Momentum, Trump Tweets, and looking for a second opinion
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20150-87c0172e440a4b8a955257d598903912/81/446/9f89630a-3ac2-4e87-bf5c-f3f2fb941db5)** Our movement to re-open our great nation and re-start our great American economy is working, but there is still much work to do. Remember when states, such as Georgia, Florida, etc, began to re-open, Democrats and the Mainstream Media forecast doom and gloom over them. They predicted massive spikes in infection statewide and the reinstatement of lockdowns. Well, they were wrong. ABC News released a report looking at the 21 states that eased restrictions May 4th or earlier and found no major increase in hospitalizations, deaths, or percentage of people testing positive in any of the states. Now, that is not to say the coronavirus hasn’t taken a toll on our country, it has. While we aren’t sure of the exact number because of inconsistencies in how deaths are counted, we know thousands of Americans have died as a result of a virus that was hidden by the Chinese Communist Party, and allowed to spread around the world. Our hearts go out to the families who have lost loved ones due to the callous lies of the Chinese government. On top of the deaths caused directly by the Wuhan virus, the response by state and local governments, and the continued lockdowns have caused over 40 million Americans to file for unemployment. This pandemic and the tyranny that emerged with it have wreaked havoc on our country and we commend both the health care workers that have taken care of the sick, and the elected officials who are utilizing the actual science and data to reopen, and who understand that our rights do not disappear because of a virus. | |
---
As we have called to re-open America, many have said that we shouldn’t.

Many in the Democratic Party and the Mainstream Media have said if we re-open our country, we will undoubtedly see spikes in infections and subsequent deaths. Many have said we are not ready to re-open our country.

We don’t take medical advice from partisan actors and the media, we take medical advice from doctors. And that is why next week we will be releasing a series where we ask doctors fighting on the front-lines of the Coronavirus pandemic for a second opinion.

You will not want to miss this.

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTUwLTg3YzAxNzJlNDQwYTRiOGE5NTUyNTdkNTk4OTAzOTEy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2Vjb25kb3Bpbmlvbi1sZXR0ZXItcmVxdWVzdC8_bWlkPTQyMTAzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=ZL53n867Zzn4bxxXby6uiw)

**[Have Your Doctor Sign Our Letter to the President](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTUwLTg3YzAxNzJlNDQwYTRiOGE5NTUyNTdkNTk4OTAzOTEy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2Vjb25kb3Bpbmlvbi1sZXR0ZXItcmVxdWVzdC8_bWlkPTQyMTAzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=XJZ0u5TySq0zX2c1X_ch5Q)**
We need to get as many doctors to sign onto a letter to President Trump about how our country needs a second opinion and how the so-called “experts” are not always right. If you are able, ask your doctor (or any other doctors you know) to sign on! **[Share this...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTUwLTg3YzAxNzJlNDQwYTRiOGE5NTUyNTdkNTk4OTAzOTEy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2Vjb25kb3Bpbmlvbi1sZXR0ZXItcmVxdWVzdC8_bWlkPTQyMTAzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=gss1BjEY_647wls8jl3g6w)**
|
---
After continued provocation, President Trump finally said enough is enough.

Earlier this week, President Trump signed an Executive Order aimed at holding big-tech accountable for their continued bias and censorship. The Executive Order specifically takes aim at Section 230 of the Communications Decency Act, which serves as a legal liability shield for internet companies. Section 230 effectively says that platforms cannot be held accountable for what users publish on their platform.

The motivation behind the executive order was Twitter “fact-checking” tweets sent out by the President himself. Many have argued that in doing so, Twitter is exercising editorial authority over content, and therefore acting as a publisher, not a public forum.

If Section 230 is amended, as the Trump Administration wishes, this would allow for Twitter to be held legally liable as a publisher of content.

The Executive Order is, reportedly, expected to face lengthy legal challenges because it would completely alter the social media landscape as we know it.
|
---

body:

|

Mike needs every single one of us to pull on the oars and heave around on the rigging. It is an "All Hands On Deck" moment. [_**We 're $105,000 short of our pre-primary fundraising drive. Can you chip in now? **_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2565/33365068/4a7922ac/3f8bcc3d/60304396/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200529_em_fr_deadline2_all_l1") | [Chip in >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2565/33365068/4a7922ac/3f8bcc3e/60304396/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200529_em_fr_deadline2_all_btn")

The Franken Crew

\-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Mike Franken
Subject: We're on the last leg
Date: May 28, 2020
Hello, shipmates -- we're on the last leg of this primary campaign. And by George, things are heating up.
We've earned endorsements from major Pulitzer Prize-winning newspapers across the state: _The Des Moines Register_ and _The Storm Lake Times_. President Obama's Secretary of Defense, Chuck Hagel, endorsed our campaign as well.
We've also seen support pour in from every single county in Iowa. Endorsements and letters to the editor populate every newspaper in the state, big or small. No other candidate can compete.
Clearly, Iowa is ready for a change in leadership. We're ready to get the Senate working for us -- not for greedy special interests or their lobbyists.
We have the momentum. The outside groups attacking us didn't slow us down; they only added coal to the furnace. I'm thankful that so many of you called out their attacks for what they are: an attempt to discredit me and my military service.
[_**Now is the time to take further action. We need to raise another $138,000 before election day. Make a last-minute donation today, and help us win on June 2nd >>**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2565/33365068/4a7922ac/3f8bcc3f/60304396/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200529_em_fr_deadline2_all_l2")

The Franken Crew \-------- Forwarded message -------- From: Mike Franken Subject: We're on the last leg Date: May 28, 2020 Hello, shipmates -- we're on the last leg of this primary campaign. And by George, things are heating up. We've earned endorsements from major Pulitzer Prize-winning newspapers across the state: The Des Moines Register and The Storm Lake Times. subject: Last-minute request, can you help?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
My name is Steph, and I'm a Republican volunteer for Cory Gardner's reelection campaign here in Colorado. I saw your name on a list of potential supporters who Cory could potentially rely on this month before the May 31st Fundraising Deadline and wanted to reach out before you sign off for the weekend. Is this a good time?
_Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._
---

body:

| Dear Patriot,
First and foremost, I would like to thank you for taking the time to read these Chronicles.
While I know at times this Primary has gotten heated, I believe it is imperative to set the record straight and distinguish myself as the only true Pro-Trump Conservative in this race. For our final segment in the Chronicles, we will discuss Lisa Scheller's close personal relationship with Obama and his administration.
Classic Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller claims that she's against corporate handouts.
But once again, the facts say differently.
Lisa Scheller claims she opposes these million-dollar handouts; UNLESS they directly benefit her and her company.
During the Great Recession, Lisa Scheller took nearly HALF A MILLION DOLLARS of stimulus from the Obama Administration and used it to install solar panels at her privately owned company. Her company took this money with absolutely ZERO oversight.
It's possible that Lisa Scheller simply used Obama's money as a nice little "Christmas Bonus."
Or maybe, she's been using Obama's money to fund her political campaigns? I'm sure that is why she has no problem writing her campaign a check for around $600,000!!
So when Lisa Scheller says she believe one thing, she usually acts on the exact opposite. Particularly if it involves stealing from the American taxpayers!
, I cannot fight Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller and her Obama Administration money on my own. I need your support now, before it is too late.
I encourage you to make a donation of $100, $50, or even just $10 to my campaign right now!!

She likes to hire expensive Harrisburg and D.C. consultants to do her dirty work.
She is Pro-Abortion.
She is Anti-Trump.
She is Pro-Sanctuary City.
She is Pro-Tax Increases.
She is Against Mental Health Funding.
She loves Barack Obama and the money he gave her!
So, while Lisa Scheller may claim one thing, she will always act the other way. Just like all of the other current RINO's in office.
There is only one true Pro-Trump Conservative out there, and that is me.
The truth is, Lehigh Valley does not need another Washington Establishment politician trying to run things from their cozy corner office in D.C.
Together, we can restore Lehigh Valley and bring back Conservative values that built this great country.
I am here to work for you. I am here to work for the people of Pennsylvania's 7th district. And most importantly, I am here to serve the best interests of the United States of America.
Election Day is coming soon, and I hope you will support me in this Primary.

Lisa Scheller \--------Forwarded Message Below-------- Peter, May was a HUGE month for our campaign to take back PA-07.
Even in the midst of a global pandemic, we’re reaching voters all across the Lehigh Valley, tackling the issues that hardworking Pennsylvanians care about, and getting out the vote from all corners of the district.
Along the way, the noise coming from the Lehigh Valley that we are READY for change has reached the President of the United States. Last Friday, we officially received the complete and total endorsement from President Donald J. Trump... Take a look for yourself: [ ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=6109d569cb534887984d3fd8c97cd7f0&_e=MoSLqHD8oEovu-4nEMEfNm3QQpsADZ42QbO2pB5K2YMeXua3PB-POZnnds8WoYIdubQ_mHb1q09yGJvCMtrNIqq40N4ocizMCBJpAT9qPGIRTLbiYYfAosOJeb9PM9KiRfM3BNj0_KpThNFar4RPKC0Wh-PtiiTrodmavO8s7Ub2TGWm1OsLOyzUetw7rgvJ9EM7dNWDOt9AVe88c2j8p9APg2QKqaTPmyFb6jhh3elT0ibe48RPa9TSehFn38KiCtgY03DwOd5m8bYvIGpaSOFwmZ12-CM1xlLtmboZi-79wPq46EcqDvsnvSNt3nDE3aA0o_Oi-Txf3ql1qpKb1XXMNj-gloo3ond04tkiAq2wcrEU5jizL7ba8dDarD-gxUyvrXvnsKWtFf1vtDYTQh89kI-hkp-_2c3_bBScG46fYCnNyt1SqVAuPy_zDlNC788SOsZ75OMlYtcdkLTEgA%3D%3D) Peter, while I’m tremendously grateful for the support from our nation’s commander in chief, we cannot and must not stop there.

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: Granite State Conversations 2.0, official declaration of candidacy, and more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a3d737c74d09b1e6/016976f38b6e1a7bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Campaign Relaunches Voter Events as “Granite State Conversations 2.0” to Address Post-COVID-19 Social and Economic Realities Facing New Hampshire**
As the state and its residents prepare for life after the COVID-19 pandemic and begin to deal with its impact on New Hampshire’s economic, educational and social fabric, our voter outreach program will continue online as a series of Zoom conservations focused on the challenges ahead.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a3d737c74d09b1e6/05ab051727e20275c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
In addition to the launch of “Granite State Conversations 2.0,” the campaign next week is expected to unveil its post-COVID-19 issues plan focusing on the issues facing Granite Staters, businesses, schools and other entities as the state emerges from lockdowns and pandemic-related restrictions.

The “Conversations” events begin Wednesday, June 3, at 6:30 p.m. with an Education Policy roundtable. Other scheduled events include Veterans Issues Tuesday, June 9, at 6:30 p.m.; Second Amendment Rights on Wednesday, June 17, at 6:30 p.m.; and Small Business & Economic Recovery Tuesday, June 23, at 6:30 p.m.

Granite Staters interested in participating in the roundtables and other events can learn more at **[CorkyforSenate.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a3d737c74d09b1e6/1cf98eb4b47baa8ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

“Our events will address how we move forward as a state and as a nation,” says Corky. “These interactive discussions will focus on what challenges we face as our economy reopens and how we can work together to recover from the pandemic and address the critical needs of New Hampshire businesses, non-profits, and other areas that have been so severely impacted by this unprecedented public health crisis.”
|
---
**In the News**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a3d737c74d09b1e6/9fda1b75ec0fb06cc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
WMUR Primary Source reported on Corky’s plans to file a Declaration of Candidacy next week in person while adhering to COVID-19 social distancing guidelines and foregoing the usual State House rally. He will be met outside the State House in Concord by election officials from the Office of the Secretary of State and the event will be broadcast live via Facebook.
“I am looking forward to officially kicking off our campaign,” says Corky. “As I have been saying for months now, I am running to return our country to the freedoms and liberty upon which our nation was founded, and the ‘Live Free or Die’ spirit upon which our state was built. Granite Staters deserve a Senator who truly reflects their values and concerns.”

[**Read more**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a3d737c74d09b1e6/ce0a88a86a107fc0c3d6b838967d376c/33153).
|
---
**Missed Corky Live on Facebook?**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a3d737c74d09b1e6/402347077d94276bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Check out this look at the latest visit with Corky via Facebook. He talks about encouraging innovation and entrepreneurship. “Those things feed the liberty and economic freedom of this country,” he explains. **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a3d737c74d09b1e6/e4170bfda5cec7cfc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** to view the session.
|
---
**New Endorsers Join Messner Campaign Team**
Former State Representative Fred Rice and Belknap County Deputy Sheriff Bill Wright have joined the Messner team.

“We continue to attract the support of Granite Staters who believe we need a change of leadership in the U.S. Senate,” says Corky. “I’m thankful for their endorsements, and will count on them to help me defeat incumbent Jeanne Shaheen in November.”

Like Corky, Rice is a West Point graduate, and lives in Hampton. He represented Rockingham-District 21 from 2010 to 2016. Bill Wright is running for Belknap County Sheriff. His wife, Teresa, is joining him as a Corky supporter!
|
---
**Upcoming Events - Check Our Website!**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a3d737c74d09b1e6/19f2fe7378c5e518c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
We recently hosted our biggest tele-town hall ever, and we continue our Conversations 2.0 roundtables and other virtual events, so check our website regularly for information about the campaign and opportunities to ask Corky _your_ questions.
“Conversations” events – Visit our website at **[CorkyforSenate.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a3d737c74d09b1e6/16ac7f994fe022bec3d6b838967d376c/33153)** to register!

**[Veterans Issues](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a3d737c74d09b1e6/7b321637dea2624fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** \- Tuesday, June 9, at 6:30 p.m.
Second Amendment Rights - Wednesday, June 17, at 6:30 p.m
**[Small Business& Economic Recovery](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a3d737c74d09b1e6/d0d67fb653318234c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** \- Tuesday, June 23, at 6:30 p.m.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a3d737c74d09b1e6/18d11741581a119dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

We love to hear from Granite Staters, so **[submit a question](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a3d737c74d09b1e6/9b12fbc73f9833efc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** and Corky will answer it during his next live Facebook event.
|

He talks about encouraging innovation and entrepreneurship. “Those things feed the liberty and economic freedom of this country,” he explains. to view the session. | New Endorsers Join Messner Campaign Team Former State Representative Fred Rice and Belknap County Deputy Sheriff Bill Wright have joined the Messner team. “We continue to attract the support of Granite Staters who believe we need a change of leadership in the U.S. Senate,” says Corky. “I’m thankful for their endorsements, and will count on them to help me defeat incumbent Jeanne Shaheen in November.” Like Corky, Rice is a West Point graduate, and lives in Hampton. He represented Rockingham-District 21 from 2010 to 2016. Bill Wright is running for Belknap County Sheriff. His wife, Teresa, is joining him as a Corky supporter! | Upcoming Events - Check Our Website! We recently hosted our biggest tele-town hall ever, and we continue our Conversations 2.0 roundtables and other virtual events, so check our website regularly for information about the campaign and opportunities to ask Corky your questions. “Conversations” events – Visit our website at to register! \- Wednesday, June 3, at 6:30 p.m. \- Tuesday, June 9, at 6:30 p.m. Second Amendment Rights - Wednesday, June 17, at 6:30 p.m \- Tuesday, June 23, at 6:30 p.m. We love to hear from Granite Staters, so and Corky will answer it during his next live Facebook event. | IMPORTANT CORONAVIRUS SUPPORT INFO HEALTH INFORMATION New Hampshire Department of Health & Human Services Fact Sheet – . name: Senator Joni Ernst
subject: Help Ashley flip this seat!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
I've been on Ashley's Team since Day 1 and I can't wait to be on the ballot with her this November.
Friend,
First off, I want you to know what an honor it is to represent you in the United States Senate. I'm proud to go to work and fight for Iowans every single day. The COVID-19 pandemic has been incredibly challenging for Iowans, but I have faith that we will get through this together.
I am writing to you today to ask you to support Ashley Hinson for Congress in the First District. The last 16 months have made it abundantly clear that we need to flip the US House and take the Speaker's gavel from Nancy Pelosi. From impeaching President Trump, to delaying the USMCA for over a year, to passing a smorgasbord of far-left legislation, Pelosi and her House Democrats have stood against everything we stand for as conservatives and as Iowans. **Flipping the House back to Republican control starts with Iowa 's first district, and Ashley Hinson is the perfect candidate for the job**.
Ashley is a proven leader in her two terms in the Iowa House, with a consistent and conservative voting record. She's fought to cut taxes, balance the budget, and give our veterans the support they deserve. These are the commonsense policies we need in Washington, and Ashley's record shows she can get the job done.
With conservatives like Ashley Hinson in the House of Representatives, we can get back to implementing President Trump's conservative agenda. If you live in the first district, please vote for Ashley on June 2nd. If you live anywhere else in Iowa, you can support her fight to turn the House of Representatives red by [**donating today**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tRK27IvsexQCoWKKr4vdomB9oXdrhZQQSXBPceYkep8NkmmNMLlQMbxVJnKbc7hkh5MrM3Ha0CVFP8F5F1OHhXF5daadEMiF0rvRHnOaeCai0IexzAc5JwPPzGl3yhBDJ1q8BFNbNWvvRngL2Zd6PEzJxuevOzAeLNw1B_gnPwuzbqUzk0Krnw9cCPR6pKKOlzdtEh3OE1g7uVjnvR-dVBzKdcJBjfRza3ROVL2fyiIRuUKGriWpNHb7wgzRZiZolIVnw6OO-I8k1mJjAUgzrquwyojql5HNo-_ZoRvzIWx-BLHTqlNkoYPHmFZlm8PPeluCzgwVTW8xfM4oPg1Jc_3YJ3LUiJ4FuetN2sRXqBEPkCeiaE5AVA==&c=qLcpe93gvUKKJ1ZsXVk-mOotvIvFx6Z98t5ua2iRg3Fj4eUG36NxAA==&ch=EiadD6mbRR-WfhOigCWLLCUdgL-ysfheU9Y9NWR8He30YeI71z8Bfw==).

Joni

Friend,

Did you hear the news?

Sleepy Joe Biden’s campaign announced their May End-of-Month Goal is to raise $6,000,000.

You’ve always been one of my most LOYAL supporters, so when I found out about Joe’s goal, I knew that I needed to come straight to you with an important announcement.

name: Charles Booker
subject: This can’t keep happening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Our country is mourning right now. There’s been so much loss, so much heartbreak the past couple of weeks.
#
Our country is mourning right now. There’s been so much loss, so much heartbreak the past couple weeks.
>From the 100,000 lives we’ve lost to COVID-19, to the murder of Ahmaud Arbery, to the senseless police brutality that took away the lives of Breonna Taylor and George Floyd, and violence at a protest in Louisville last night — there’s a lot of hurting going on right now.
In a just society, our leaders have the responsibility to ensure that the constitutional protections afforded to some are always and undeniably afforded to all. That’s what this moment is about. That’s what our sisters and brothers — of all races — stood in the streets of Louisville last night praying, singing, crying, and locking arms to demand.
If we want to write a new chapter in politics that values racial equality, puts people first, and believes in ending police brutality — **we desperately need to change the way we do politics. **
**[If you agree, can you sign our pledge to stand with our campaign and the fight for real change this election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17680615/202564129/979025271?source=em20200529-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGJmOTdiNC1mZGExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cizztwSXhdgp_wh23tFXzOkKB5jkYXMw3EAtYgcCzY=&emci=bae01b29-fba1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=28bf97b4-fda1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)**
In solidarity,
Charles

name: Larry P. Arnn, Hillsdale College
subject: Help us understand the rise of socialism
body:
| | |
---
| | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pISyyga2x4aqX0bVcUv9HWB5Qz97vQdcIYdjzcL-Ac6w_68SM0nBbwM2QR99fpfeSFsMnVTNXJr2QA5g_Ws0gVW10SXNBYNknMAqevKIW5XUkSK7ZVT3qacNC40Zs4n8yBNkhVLKzDOjpqQW2VcCH-YDWD1o_QvtmHZbftNcaOqgBMl4ZsK6PcZygHw9c0frd1RTrCJMWZSPbf9kC57AGCabA0m9Wni0ChlyJ8R0OyPsAO6D6EtJXULLJrf1Nj72EwsXkKZvYxF-sNPQcPkCjUJQj8WpxJ35w2wZxy5oDcxywb-rCEYEAkNsACUyLHe1FuHWMycHYQK2VPbTfxLo-daytvFTEPiSLs5BVib33i4Hc7V4uqueV_nxTNuVVV3u&c=62mbK6769mkoTVH8B1bmfW33_AEO1FudnzcZ5NhPyMLkOP7p89yonA==&ch=jj_dCxfDDh6NmuqTeZsXOCOjfX0MKe2Wc5vKj7CBvPRmBUnl2-1bPw==)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, particularly among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That's why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach, especially right now, as many people are home because of our recent national emergency. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today by completing this National Survey on Socialism: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2020-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pISyyga2x4aqX0bVcUv9HWB5Qz97vQdcIYdjzcL-Ac6w_68SM0nBbwM2QR99fpfeSFsMnVTNXJr2QA5g_Ws0gVW10SXNBYNknMAqevKIW5XUkSK7ZVT3qacNC40Zs4n8yBNkhVLKzDOjpqQW2VcCH-YDWD1o_QvtmHZbftNcaOqgBMl4ZsK6PcZygHw9c0frd1RTrCJMWZSPbf9kC57AGCabA0m9Wni0ChlyJ8R0OyPsAO6D6EtJXULLJrf1Nj72EwsXkKZvYxF-sNPQcPkCjUJQj8WpxJ35w2wZxy5oDcxywb-rCEYEAkNsACUyLHe1FuHWMycHYQK2VPbTfxLo-daytvFTEPiSLs5BVib33i4Hc7V4uqueV_nxTNuVVV3u&c=62mbK6769mkoTVH8B1bmfW33_AEO1FudnzcZ5NhPyMLkOP7p89yonA==&ch=jj_dCxfDDh6NmuqTeZsXOCOjfX0MKe2Wc5vKj7CBvPRmBUnl2-1bPw==) There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy. And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pISyyga2x4aqX0bVcUv9HWB5Qz97vQdcIYdjzcL-Ac6w_68SM0nBbwM2QR99fpfeSFsMnVTNXJr2QA5g_Ws0gVW10SXNBYNknMAqevKIW5XUkSK7ZVT3qacNC40Zs4n8yBNkhVLKzDOjpqQW2VcCH-YDWD1o_QvtmHZbftNcaOqgBMl4ZsK6PcZygHw9c0frd1RTrCJMWZSPbf9kC57AGCabA0m9Wni0ChlyJ8R0OyPsAO6D6EtJXULLJrf1Nj72EwsXkKZvYxF-sNPQcPkCjUJQj8WpxJ35w2wZxy5oDcxywb-rCEYEAkNsACUyLHe1FuHWMycHYQK2VPbTfxLo-daytvFTEPiSLs5BVib33i4Hc7V4uqueV_nxTNuVVV3u&c=62mbK6769mkoTVH8B1bmfW33_AEO1FudnzcZ5NhPyMLkOP7p89yonA==&ch=jj_dCxfDDh6NmuqTeZsXOCOjfX0MKe2Wc5vKj7CBvPRmBUnl2-1bPw==)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

If the U.S. Presidential race was held today, which of the following candidates would you be most likely to vote for? **JOE BIDEN : 50%** **DONALD TRUMP : 43%**

If the U.S. Presidential race was held today, which of the following candidates would you be most likely to vote for? name: Rob iPhone
subject: We’re still 223 donors short, can you step up?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
Schumer's handpicked candidates are gaining ground in battleground states across the nation. With President Trump's Senate Majority held by only four seats, we're in serious danger of losing power and handing it to Chuck Schumer.
_Senator Todd Young is a fifth generation Hoosier whose commanding victory in 2016 led him to join the Senate Republican Majority.

Todd brings years of leadership experience from his background as a US Naval Academy graduate and a Marine. Todd's commitment to protecting conservative values and policies includes his fight for fiscal responsibility and America-first Foreign Affairs legislation. As a leading conservative voice in Washington, Todd simply wants to make government work better for his fellow Hoosiers and Americans nationwide.

This year, however, Todd's main priority is to defend Senate Republicans in battleground elections nationwide and he needs **YOU** to help him in this fight. _
---

name: Marcy, Digital Director
subject: building our digital program
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We're working hard to build a digital program that folks can rely on for accurate information, and that gets Mark Warner's message out to folks across the Commonwealth.
|
---
| | Derek --

I know it's the end of the month and you're likely getting a lot of fundraising appeals, but I wanted to reach out and talk a little bit about what Team Warner is doing to build a strong online campaign heading into November.

**We 're working hard to build a digital program that folks can rely on for accurate information, and that gets Mark Warner's message out to folks across the Commonwealth.** Over the last few months, we've held virtual town halls with Mark, texted thousands of Virginia voters, laid the groundwork to take our voter registration program online, and, yes, made some tuna melts.

Right now, our team is working on a brand new website, which we hope will make it even easier for Virginians to connect with Team Warner staff and with Mark himself. I can't wait to share that with you in the next few weeks.

We couldn't have done any of that without feedback and support from folks who believe in Mark's mission. Thank you for believing in our team: whether you shared a post on social media, forwarded an email of ours, talked to a family member about why you're voting for Mark Warner, or even made a donation, every little bit helps. We've got our work cut out for us to get Mark re-elected, and we need your help.

Now we're at the part where I have to ask for some money. I'm going to cut right to the chase: we have a lot of ideas for how to reach Virginia voters online, but they all cost money. I know that many are facing hardship right now, and I appreciate you taking the time to read this note and learn more about our digital program. **[If you have the means, would you consider a donation of $5?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d46a/53d9897e/54931760/1c8878af/985952414/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-online?refcode=20200529_f_1_nd__594__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Everyone says this, but it's true -- every dollar counts. Folks like you are helping us power this campaign. Together, we can move forward to safely register voters across Virginia, keep folks fired up online, and re-elect Mark and keep Virginia blue come November.

**[Are you in?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d46a/53d9897e/54931760/1c8878ae/985952414/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-online?refcode=20200529_f_1_nd__594__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support,
-- Marcy, Digital Director

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d46a/53d9897e/54931760/1c8878ad/985952414/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-online?refcode=20200529_f_1_nd__594__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---
|

Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: How do we know it's safe to move into Phase Two? These four stats.
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
A few weeks ago, I outlined the four data points we're watching closely as we track the trends of this virus. These are the metrics that, taken together, tell us whether the virus is continuing on its downward trajectory and it's safe to lift more restrictions, or whether we're seeing a resurgence and we need to pump the brakes.
Three weeks ago, we lifted the stay-at-home order. We know it takes about two weeks to see the impact of any policy changes we make. That means that, if our behavior during the first week of Phase 1 caused an increase in the spread of the virus, we would see that reflected in the data by now. Fortunately, that's not what we're seeing. Today, I'm excited to announce that all four of these metrics are where we want them to be. Because of that, we can officially move into Phase 2 on Monday.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KkHcH2FIQLp2BqFY8XmQZ33oCTZ1rYNM8sxS4HxZyutunsrE7RMX6TsqMaSzgQqkydhdXsTO_rUNO7koGj7cwabVCRXl7cHDu8-QvMB5min88sdMhg73GZKroxsRxIevxCO8NvfimQyWiKoLqP7oog==&c=H7PHNtu1XGW2-WPSVYNSeJzv7PPBiR8MI_v7NVb8RKaIblFmfnzKIw==&ch=mMdRY1inCRsPBLtXoLxiqjYI9gDJuyVjswoyoop74Qm8pU4JfXtqPA==)
---
| First, we said we needed to see less than 70% of hospital beds filled with COVID patients. We have less than half of that - we're below 30% -- and in fact our hospitalizations have been on a steady decline for more than a month.
Second, we needed to see consistently 30 or fewer new hospitalizations each day. We are seeing well below 30. Most days we see new hospitalizations in the high teens or low 20s.
Third, we said we needed to see our rate of spread - known as the "R-value" - at 1.1 or lower. I'm particularly pleased with where this metric is today. A couple months ago, our R-value was as high as 4, meaning four people were being infected by each person who had the virus. Today, our R-value is around 0.7. In other words, only 7 people are infected by every 10 people who have the virus. We've seen that number on a continuous decline, and that's great news.
Fourth, we said we wanted to see hospitalizations doubling at a rate of every month or more. Fortunately, hospitalizations are continuing to decline, meaning we're not seeing any doubling at all.
As we enter Phase 2, we're going to continue keeping a close eye on these four metrics, and if we continue on the path we're on, then I'm optimistic that we'll be able to enter into Phase 3 in July. But if we start getting lax about the public safety precautions, then we may need to take a step back.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KkHcH2FIQLp2BqFY8XmQZ33oCTZ1rYNM8sxS4HxZyutunsrE7RMX6UjLMa7KAOFT8Foz4CzbkDXI1KXNqkSI935x0asurmDZ6GPNNCg1OGpdZpiHWRl7m0PJat85pkFoG9mharrcucVnpbKq7H2pEyByT7lqZO41mvTSwuop27uCl9vxm2nkbYdydHyz5niCuo4Vv8Dg6iR7pqD0MNf-783py6pFPKEu&c=H7PHNtu1XGW2-WPSVYNSeJzv7PPBiR8MI_v7NVb8RKaIblFmfnzKIw==&ch=mMdRY1inCRsPBLtXoLxiqjYI9gDJuyVjswoyoop74Qm8pU4JfXtqPA==)
---
| I'm excited about what's ahead in Phase 2. Nearly every sector of our economy will see some form of reopening - from hairdressers and barbers to nail salons, indoor dining at restaurants, malls, gyms and outdoor recreation. We're able to do this because we've worked collaboratively with the industries and health professionals to come up with a set of guidelines to help you open responsibly and keep employees and customers safe.
If you own a business and are getting ready to reopen on Monday, here are some steps you should take:

* Visit [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KkHcH2FIQLp2BqFY8XmQZ33oCTZ1rYNM8sxS4HxZyutunsrE7RMX6TsqMaSzgQqkydhdXsTO_rUNO7koGj7cwabVCRXl7cHDu8-QvMB5min88sdMhg73GZKroxsRxIevxCO8NvfimQyWiKoLqP7oog==&c=H7PHNtu1XGW2-WPSVYNSeJzv7PPBiR8MI_v7NVb8RKaIblFmfnzKIw==&ch=mMdRY1inCRsPBLtXoLxiqjYI9gDJuyVjswoyoop74Qm8pU4JfXtqPA==) and review both the Phase 2 general business guidelines and the guidance documents specific to your individual sector (restaurants, retail, hair and personal services, gyms, etc).
* Please make sure that you've completed your COVID-19 control plan. There's a template for that plan on the [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KkHcH2FIQLp2BqFY8XmQZ33oCTZ1rYNM8sxS4HxZyutunsrE7RMX6TsqMaSzgQqkydhdXsTO_rUNO7koGj7cwabVCRXl7cHDu8-QvMB5min88sdMhg73GZKroxsRxIevxCO8NvfimQyWiKoLqP7oog==&c=H7PHNtu1XGW2-WPSVYNSeJzv7PPBiR8MI_v7NVb8RKaIblFmfnzKIw==&ch=mMdRY1inCRsPBLtXoLxiqjYI9gDJuyVjswoyoop74Qm8pU4JfXtqPA==) website - please complete the plan before you reopen.
* If you missed Commerce's Facebook Live Town Hall or want a refresher, you can watch them on the [Rhode Island Commerce Facebook page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KkHcH2FIQLp2BqFY8XmQZ33oCTZ1rYNM8sxS4HxZyutunsrE7RMX6UnOVIjNr4O3q5MkFfDN7zobR82wbEvEIbC2cVsLOpWZDfeYqHvTLD6bBSBlbj0FRJZEuztCVCpufGI-CSp_LDM4bJqSGLUr1f6rbLIDYqUh&c=H7PHNtu1XGW2-WPSVYNSeJzv7PPBiR8MI_v7NVb8RKaIblFmfnzKIw==&ch=mMdRY1inCRsPBLtXoLxiqjYI9gDJuyVjswoyoop74Qm8pU4JfXtqPA==).
* If you're a small business who is looking for masks and cleaning solutions , Commerce is making these available through industry associations and local chambers of commerce. Visit [www.commerceri.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KkHcH2FIQLp2BqFY8XmQZ33oCTZ1rYNM8sxS4HxZyutunsrE7RMX6Ra3kEFPDrl7D-amb9lA2-ghjd7nx3S6FgO2WADHIy4pZ5vk_gB_vuieN-EjJEQFXn7ApWXPUMvMxRYg_suxoUEYLU9gZQOe5w==&c=H7PHNtu1XGW2-WPSVYNSeJzv7PPBiR8MI_v7NVb8RKaIblFmfnzKIw==&ch=mMdRY1inCRsPBLtXoLxiqjYI9gDJuyVjswoyoop74Qm8pU4JfXtqPA==) for information and locations on how you can pick that up.

| This next step of our reopening is only possible because of your hard work. By following our public health guidance, we've been able to slow the spread of COVID-19. I am incredibly proud of Rhode Islanders, but we're not out of the woods. As we reopen, we will need to be more cautious than ever. We all have an obligation to our friends, families, and neighbors to play it safe and follow the new guidance. If we do, we'll continue to reopen our economy and get back towards normal.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, A few weeks ago, I outlined the four data points we're watching closely as we track the trends of this virus. These are the metrics that, taken together, tell us whether the virus is continuing on its downward trajectory and it's safe to lift more restrictions, or whether we're seeing a resurgence and we need to pump the brakes. Three weeks ago, we lifted the stay-at-home order. We know it takes about two weeks to see the impact of any policy changes we make. That means that, if our behavior during the first week of Phase 1 caused an increase in the spread of the virus, we would see that reflected in the data by now. Fortunately, that's not what we're seeing. Today, I'm excited to announce that all four of these metrics are where we want them to be. Because of that, we can officially move into Phase 2 on Monday. | == | First, we said we needed to see less than 70% of hospital beds filled with COVID patients. We have less than half of that - we're below 30% -- and in fact our hospitalizations have been on a steady decline for more than a month. Second, we needed to see consistently 30 or fewer new hospitalizations each day. We are seeing well below 30. Most days we see new hospitalizations in the high teens or low 20s. Third, we said we needed to see our rate of spread - known as the "R-value" - at 1.1 or lower. I'm particularly pleased with where this metric is today. A couple months ago, our R-value was as high as 4, meaning four people were being infected by each person who had the virus. Today, our R-value is around 0.7. In other words, only 7 people are infected by every 10 people who have the virus. We've seen that number on a continuous decline, and that's great news. Fourth, we said we wanted to see hospitalizations doubling at a rate of every month or more. Fortunately, hospitalizations are continuing to decline, meaning we're not seeing any doubling at all. As we enter Phase 2, we're going to continue keeping a close eye on these four metrics, and if we continue on the path we're on, then I'm optimistic that we'll be able to enter into Phase 3 in July. But if we start getting lax about the public safety precautions, then we may need to take a step back. | == | I'm excited about what's ahead in Phase 2. Nearly every sector of our economy will see some form of reopening - from hairdressers and barbers to nail salons, indoor dining at restaurants, malls, gyms and outdoor recreation. We're able to do this because we've worked collaboratively with the industries and health professionals to come up with a set of guidelines to help you open responsibly and keep employees and customers safe. If you own a business and are getting ready to reopen on Monday, here are some steps you should take: Visit == and review both the Phase 2 general business guidelines and the guidance documents specific to your individual sector (restaurants, retail, hair and personal services, gyms, etc). Please make sure that you've completed your COVID-19 control plan. There's a template for that plan on the == website - please complete the plan before you reopen. If you missed Commerce's Facebook Live Town Hall or want a refresher, you can watch them on the ==. If you're a small business who is looking for masks and cleaning solutions , Commerce is making these available through industry associations and local chambers of commerce. Visit == for information and locations on how you can pick that up. | == | To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's == for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island. | This next step of our reopening is only possible because of your hard work. By following our public health guidance, we've been able to slow the spread of COVID-19. I am incredibly proud of Rhode Islanders, but we're not out of the woods. As we reopen, we will need to be more cautious than ever. We all have an obligation to our friends, families, and neighbors to play it safe and follow the new guidance. If we do, we'll continue to reopen our economy and get back towards normal. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov in collaboration with |

name: Tina Smith
subject: George Floyd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friend — After the murder of George Floyd in Minneapolis on Monday, I have heard the pain and grief, the anger and exhaustion of people in our community, crying out in response to this devastating loss of life by the police who have sworn to protect and defend us. Dr. King once said, "A riot is the language of the unheard. And what is it that America has failed to hear? ... It has failed to hear that the promises of freedom and justice have not been met." I feel deeply saddened by what is happening in the city that I love, the state I love, the place where we raised our kids — but I know it’s because we haven’t acknowledged and done the work to face the systemic problems rooted deep in our history. As a country, we have so much difficulty facing the racism that is our history, and this is true also in Minnesota. When we see it, we explain or turn away rather than facing the injustice full on. In this moment, we need to break through that. We cannot look away from the reality that a man was killed by a police officer, while others watched him plead for his life. We cannot look away from the reality that a woman, Breonna Taylor, was killed by police in her home in Louisville. We cannot look away from the reality that a man, Ahmaud Arbery, was killed while out jogging. This is not a single instance — it's a repeated pattern that goes against our humanity and everything we know is right. I have spoken with many community members and leaders over the past few days. As Reverend Billy Russell said to me, “We need to make it right. It’s not right now, but we need to make it right.” To make it right, we need consequences and accountability, not explanations. We won’t get there through “better training” or “improved policies and procedures.” Our work is to root out the culture of racism and abuse of power at the heart of a system that allows the Black community and so many other marginalized communities to be killed, abused, and taunted by law enforcement over and over again. Hoping this will get better is not a strategy. We need to address the systems of oppression that perpetuate this violence and that failed to provide justice to Jamar Clark and Philando Castile. I will work for justice to be served for George Floyd, and I will fight to fix the systems that allow this injustice to be perpetuated. This community is ALL of our community — and part of our community is hurting. The only way we are all safe is to acknowledge what happened and work to seek justice. This seat in the U.S. Senate belongs to all Minnesotans, and especially the unheard who wait for the justice they deserve, and I will use it to lift up their voices, and their families, and their experiences. — Tina **[P.S. If you’ve been wondering what you could do to help, I encourage you to donate to two organizations, Minnesota Voice and We Love Lake Street, that are doing important work to give back to the communities of color that have been impacted by this tragedy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17681559/202597517/80862072?refcode=em200529-floyd&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFiMmMxOS0wZWEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqxW_gEq4kbXnpYUimvQf4iO1XRod2ywKEOyt1hHc0A=)**

clean_body: | Friend — After the murder of George Floyd in Minneapolis on Monday, I have heard the pain and grief, the anger and exhaustion of people in our community, crying out in response to this devastating loss of life by the police who have sworn to protect and defend us. Dr. King once said, "A riot is the language of the unheard. And what is it that America has failed to hear? ... It has failed to hear that the promises of freedom and justice have not been met." I feel deeply saddened by what is happening in the city that I love, the state I love, the place where we raised our kids — but I know it’s because we haven’t acknowledged and done the work to face the systemic problems rooted deep in our history. As a country, we have so much difficulty facing the racism that is our history, and this is true also in Minnesota. When we see it, we explain or turn away rather than facing the injustice full on. In this moment, we need to break through that. We cannot look away from the reality that a man was killed by a police officer, while others watched him plead for his life. We cannot look away from the reality that a woman, Breonna Taylor, was killed by police in her home in Louisville. We cannot look away from the reality that a man, Ahmaud Arbery, was killed while out jogging. This is not a single instance — it's a repeated pattern that goes against our humanity and everything we know is right. I have spoken with many community members and leaders over the past few days. As Reverend Billy Russell said to me, “We need to make it right. It’s not right now, but we need to make it right.” To make it right, we need consequences and accountability, not explanations. We won’t get there through “better training” or “improved policies and procedures.” Our work is to root out the culture of racism and abuse of power at the heart of a system that allows the Black community and so many other marginalized communities to be killed, abused, and taunted by law enforcement over and over again. Hoping this will get better is not a strategy. We need to address the systems of oppression that perpetuate this violence and that failed to provide justice to Jamar Clark and Philando Castile. I will work for justice to be served for George Floyd, and I will fight to fix the systems that allow this injustice to be perpetuated. This community is ALL of our community — and part of our community is hurting. The only way we are all safe is to acknowledge what happened and work to seek justice. This seat in the U.S. Senate belongs to all Minnesotans, and especially the unheard who wait for the justice they deserve, and I will use it to lift up their voices, and their families, and their experiences. — Tina = Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.
