body:
Throughout these last few months, Governor Holcomb has been talking with Hoosiers directly. On an almost daily basis, he's shared updates about...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/getting-back-to-normal-469293?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://holcombforindiana.com/new-poll/?mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Historic Approval

Throughout these last few months, Governor Holcomb has been talking with Hoosiers directly. On an almost daily basis, he's shared updates about actions he's taken to protect Hoosiers' health and how he's worked to get our state safely back on track.

In this crisis situation, there’s been a connection built between an elected official and his constituency like we’ve never seen. We did a poll last week (https://mcusercontent.com/80a71c2714359455775d068a2/files/02a7a6a2-4a4f-4049-b18a-f55566874f62/5.29.20_Polling_Memo.pdf?mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to see what Hoosiers were thinking, and they told us.

They said that 83% percent approve of the governor’s response to the pandemic and 79% approval of his overall job performance. It's consistent with numbers we've seen (https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2020/05/19/49-50-governors-have-better-coronavirus-numbers-than-trump/?mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) from the Washington Post poll released last week.

That support then carries over to November. A head-to-head match-up favors Governor Holcomb by a landslide margin. Sixty-four percent support the governor with only 21% supporting the presumptive Democrat nominee.

Governor Holcomb knows that when you have the right policies, the politics will take care of themselves. That’s why he’ll continue to be laser-focused on guiding our state through the pandemic and ensuring we come roaring back better than ever before.

#BackonTrack,
- Chairman Kyle Hupfer
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Back on Track:
Mental Health & Scientific Testing

As we continue our state's phased reopening, most of Indiana is in Phase 3 of Indiana's Back on Track plan (https://backontrack.in.gov/files/BackOnTrack-IN_WhatsOpen-Closed-stage3.pdf?utm_source=iterable&utm_campaign=1249816&utm_medium=alert&utm_term=covid&utm_content=hf&mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) ! And as we continue Indiana's phased, safety-focused reopening, Governor Holcomb wants to make sure Hoosiers are continuing to take care of the full sphere of their health.

Check out some resources he highlighted this week:
* Telehealth services: Claims for mental health services have remained at a steady rate compared to pre-pandemic rates. And that’s because we’re seeing an increase in services provided through telehealth.
* Naloxone & Substance Abuse Treatment: Indiana is providing more naloxone kits directly to the public – one of the only tools available to reverse an overdose. And remember – treatment is available. Just call 211 or visit www.treatmentconnection.com (http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6nzNB6DorspueGj8fNu5uZPzdomIkVuN&_e=hXeWD2C07xgtVfZ993sCGbr4to9nHVIMiCL2UD2xuoz3J0pk6N7W22JcfKGOi4g_LH73xXq6m5mzHemPTwcO8ccoB4JU1y0d4ErBf-MFCu7CEdJtgm6I7GYSEaT3lVbJ6MocIJVrw6fl9oN1fdEW7fZC8R9Boe1QwcbIpuwepVVEjBWFsJOg8GBxoYpq3kYIKIeYR2FsPYQIHD32uD0TdF5bZI7X5J8kkYgZ3CkVAErMJC39xQW9IaulfclDrk-uTHqzp9aBKzbyG_pvHzX3oMRPLE_6S_Hi9JjNObi2qx5j0qa_wISauasIk8Isjpo0a80eXs60R_Xu5gg85uRJVo-wumFaMoJu77BWcVwGaoOhqQbF-wBPmg8xSAYAG4Uf&mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to get connected to help.
* Domestic Violence and Suicide Prevention Hotlines: Resources are available if you’re in a bad situation at home or have thoughts of suicide. Call the Domestic Violence Hotline at 1-800-779-7233 or the Suicide Crisis Line at 1-800-273-TALK.
* Online Mental Health Tools: Last month, Indiana unveiled a new website, BeWellIndiana.org (http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6nzNB6DorspueGj8fNu5uZPzdomIkVuN&_e=hXeWD2C07xgtVfZ993sCGdBKfI3-aE-4RzF7l7xAi725QVrWXfHj9ac-3RixxDka8YDPpKgfL05h61wdLf66DdMegSBZsMmuwm6ojhEEMH3lLkPnrdPFXD9Jz6uiqU0lJ34iyxzIDAv9sMZG4RXSjhNw3N-UFVC9F3N6gEm9X4rZCKjUrhQ5eLBiDcMDvEHVe83fCjeIM8PlEFGJy6izSfnw1py-DxPEwoVVXh1xNmMF4TzydcyaPO1PJAM3ttzF2-lTzGVYgCRcP_BZSHUZGaRQoua_TmdU6_E4cVS2lp50_7drWrsBzMOUHkKro4Y3vm6jf7yEBnMRpbD5-NyFtZNNle_z3LEtMEFg8oaxgAYwhogKCFVpA_iJxlqLLJj8&mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , that’s putting free mental health resources at Hoosiers’ fingertips. And so far, there have already been more than 10,000 clicks on the website’s resources.

Starting next week, Phase 2 of Indiana’s scientific study of the spread of COVID-19 across our state (http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6nzNB6DorspueGj8fNu5uZPzdomIkVuN&_e=hXeWD2C07xgtVfZ993sCGWoktx04RQj4QzVa0iYOxSlPpd0YhZ4QW40RdXianHtdj8ezta4g7CFyBkRyPE6lE-UTbnjg3Z9kL1rRC7FTrDUpPAOCO1bA_QI3r7XSqOG31qMOe3moOwO13Q9Q-BK2wb0AdrugiIjeATD-ArITAl6ZLfT4OWAvXxAehWPePYBfH5J8rYumzj1sGn5DvjzBD1iy6lPkK4ROOcPjtNEcaHmUt0AB87flD-Q4zIhth-BnDTiuyc9-HawMnmRzpYBH53iZ5cKz9u9cA_IgXD-75tMfwFMrbaDlyLyJFKGVzTCoY9yMMxlBRndWxaulHaPufyCO-IsUkZt7KUXAS0kTXHUPCee8IwHyTnLee66YzyDpN7qT-kmyqOGeDEHsyTDu6a6HJdLfKY-oQzuGS2X-L_w32vT_OuWBFcWaDAAFD1CUm6t2dZTQdHlFDGBn3iJKwpgXEF9K1NKNHwuNp1S8vX0%3D&mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) is beginning! If you get a text message or a postcard inviting you to participate, please respond. Your response helps guide Indiana’s data-driven reopening and informs Governor Holcomb's decisions. This is just another way we can be #INThisTogether and help our communities.

To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/?mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , Twitter (https://twitter.com/holcombforin?mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) and Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/holcombforin/?mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Thank you to every Hoosier who is doing his or her part to stop the spread of the coronavirus and flatten the curve. We're #INThisTogether, and we're getting #BackOnTrack!

https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1266131311699378176?mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Thank you, President Trump!

Huge news! Just yesterday, President Donald Trump announced that as part of the CARES Act, the U.S. Department of Transportation was investing $177.5 million into Indiana's infrastructure. This encompasses a $100 million investment into the South Shore Line in Northwest Indiana and a $77.5 million investment into the IndyGo Purple Line in Marion County.

Thank you, President Trump!

https://indianavoters.in.gov/?mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Primary Day is Tuesday

Primary Day is this Tuesday! Just a few things to know:
* Polls are open from 6 a.m. to 6 p.m. on Tuesday. Please wear a mask when you go to vote.
* Early voting is open through Monday, June 1.
* If you requested an absentee ballot, make sure it's received by your local clerk or Board of Elections by 12 p.m. on Tuesday.
* Visit IndianaVoters.in.gov to find your polling place and review your ballot!

2020 Indiana Republican Convention Goes Virtual

Earlier this month we announced that unfortunately, due to restrictions because of COVID-19, this year's 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention would be held virtually.

The Indiana Republican State Committee unanimously approved temporary rules (http://indiana.gop/sites/default/files/Temporary%20Rules.pdf?mc_cid=1559200ee1&mc_eid=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) that will allow us to hold a virtual contention and mail-in voting, which will mirror many aspects of our in-person conventions, ensuring all delegates will be able to vote.
A few important dates:
June 2 – Indiana Primary (delegates will be elected)
June 22 – Approximate date that delegates will receive ballots from a third-party vendor
July 9 – Deadline for a delegate’s ballot to be received by the third-party accounting firm
July 10 – Ballots will be counted with watchers present, and winners will be announced

More updates will continue to be provided. For more information, read Chairman Hupfer’s full letter here (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/2020-indiana-republican-convention-update?e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) or watch his video here (https://vimeo.com/417726600?mc_cid=fd08a3049d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

News You Can Use

subject: Trump is pulling out of the WHO!

body:
| Here is what Trump just said. **BREAKING** : Donald Trump just said "We will be today terminating our relationship with the World Health Organization." **314 Action is dedicated to stopping Trump 's anti-science agenda and defeating him and his destructive party. **

But we're facing a major deadline on Sunday -- if you want us to keep fighting back, we need your help to get another 10,000 grassroots donors by Sunday.

name: =?iso-8859-1?q?Juli=E1n?= Castro
subject: George Floyd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People First Future
body:
I'm turning my outrage into action. That's why I’m supporting those who are putting their bodies on the line to demand justice.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17681747/202604855/-1445340428?source=emheader&refcode=emheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDdjOTMyMS0xM2EyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2Ph9lQOdfDNTaz56YFCTgc5qnUTDUs5YPwyCqGXHVY=&emci=0bb12658-07a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c07c9321-13a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=1262380)
Team, his name was **George Floyd.**
He was a 46-year-old black man from Minneapolis, Minnesota. On Monday, he was murdered when a police officer kneeled on his neck for nearly 9 minutes.
After video of George's murder went viral, the community took to the streets to demand justice.
We should be outraged by George Floyd's murder, as well as the systemic injustices that allowed it to happen. We should also be outraged at the death of **Breonna Taylor** , a Louisville EMT who was killed by police after they forcibly entered her home without warning.
Team, I'm turning my outrage into action. That's why I'm supporting those who are putting their bodies on the line to demand justice. **[Please join me in supporting Minnesota Freedom Fund, Black Visions Collective, and Reclaim the Block, three frontline groups who are providing vital support on the ground in Minneapolis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17681748/202604856/-1689950956?refcode=em20200529-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDdjOTMyMS0xM2EyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2Ph9lQOdfDNTaz56YFCTgc5qnUTDUs5YPwyCqGXHVY=)**
For too long, people of color have been disproportionately treated with excessive force and violence at the hands of police. That's why, during my campaign, I spoke out about the need for police reform and put forward the first platform to reform the broken system. I spoke the names of people like **Eric Garner, Michael Brown, Pamela Turner,** and **Antonio Arce** whose lives were cut short by police violence.
Police violence isn't a case of a few bad apples — **the entire system is broken.**
**That's why I'm asking you to be a part of changing it. The first step we can take is to provide support to those who are on the frontlines demanding change.**
**[If you're able, please chip in — your gift will be split between Minnesota Freedom Fund, Black Visions Collective, and Reclaim the Block.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17681749/202604857/-1689950956?refcode=em20200529-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDdjOTMyMS0xM2EyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2Ph9lQOdfDNTaz56YFCTgc5qnUTDUs5YPwyCqGXHVY=)**
In solidarity,
Julián
****[Contribute →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17681750/202604858/-1689950956?refcode=em20200529-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDdjOTMyMS0xM2EyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2Ph9lQOdfDNTaz56YFCTgc5qnUTDUs5YPwyCqGXHVY=)****
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17681751/202604859/565258459?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDdjOTMyMS0xM2EyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2Ph9lQOdfDNTaz56YFCTgc5qnUTDUs5YPwyCqGXHVY=&emci=0bb12658-07a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c07c9321-13a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=1262380)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Check out this absurd email Twitter just sent us
body:
We are forwarding you this email that the White House just received from Twitter. It’s so absurd, we just had to share it with you. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1f5d44b49&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 29, 2020
---
| | |
## **Check out this absurd email Twitter just sent us**

**Dear 1600 Daily subscribers,**

**We are forwarding you** this email that the White House just received from Twitter. It’s so absurd, we just had to share it with you.

**This morning,** the White House Twitter account reposted text from a tweet sent by President Trump. A short time later, Twitter censored the tweet, claiming it violated Twitter Rules about “glorifying violence.”

**That is completely false.** As [the President just explained](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b9d1273d4e&e=3ee4985eea) again, his tweet was CONDEMING violence and pledging federal support to keep Minnesotans safe.

**The email** we just received, presumably sent by a different team within Twitter, admits that the very tweet they are censoring does _not_ violate any Twitter Rules.

**Yet the tweet is still censored.**

**Twitter’s own staff** just made this much clear: Twitter is a publisher with an editorial viewpoint, NOT a platform.

**See the email** below for yourself:
---
|
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=81c00c2732&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=edb7982868&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=dded1c958a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

I need you to hear this loud and clear from me: I do not take a single endorsement for granted. It's a good reminder for both you and me to see and know that leaders and organizations support our campaign's mission. In case you need a refreshing on who has endorsed us thus far, here are a few reminders: ✔️ ✔️Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy ✔️Minority Whip Steve Scalise ✔️Rep. Elise Stefanik ✔️Pennsylvania Rep. # **_Election __Day_ _ is _**_**4 days away!**_
I'm a fighter. Always have been. I'm not going to quit on you and your family. I'm willing to continue fighting to protect families and restore the American way of life -- but I can't do it alone.

Listen, we are **FOUR. DAYS. AWAY**. from election day. We are still short of our final GOTV funding by $7,219! Can you chip in to help cover the remaining funds we need? You can donate here: [https://www.bobbyforiowa.com/donate](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=1d7bdd5eb0&e=90fad69796) I'm thankful for your prayers and support! We need to finish this fight and I can't do it alone. Chip in today! For America,

\- Bobby Schilling

name: Amanda
subject: Help Me Beat Charlie Crist
body:
| [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4caHY-Rh7prXPl8zepG6YlPsAH5tgcogzgMa35jeEIhH8kIBfeYAGPZpKg4Q-R03E-m&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_eom_1_friend&n=1) Friend -- This campaign is approaching a crucial milestone. In just a few days, we’ll be closing the books on the month of May and we need to report strong numbers to keep up with the Democrat in this race!

Our goal this month is to bring in 100 donors online. Will you help us get there with a donation of any amount right now? | [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4caHY-Rh7prXPl8zepG6YlPsEtL1nKRu775Pb5CbmBBVpN6aL820_D-rEpGQFZQlk5H&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_eom_1_friend&n=2 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4caHY-Rh7prXPl8zepG6YlPsEtL1nKRu775Pb5CbmBBVpN6aL820_D-rEpGQFZQlk5H&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_eom_1_friend&n=3)
---
[](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4caHY-Rh7prXPl8zepG6YlPsPHkodGMgsLEqBnpFLYE5BDjCx7Cih1o6zuN9i3vzxVA&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_eom_1_friend&n=4)
We’re running against Charlie Crist. He’s a career politician, he has been in office for 3 decades, and he has done nothing for Pinellas. Seriously, can you name one thing that Charlie has accomplished in his more than 30 years of running for office?

I was born in Iran, my family **legally** immigrated here as an infant after the revolution happened, and we had nothing when we made it to America. We were just happy to escape an oppressive dictatorship.

Florida’s 13th district is historically a Republican seat. It was Republican held for 40 years before Charlie Crist won, and we’re going to make it a Republican seat once again. As Pinellas goes, so goes Florida. We are going to deliver this seat for you, the voters, and for President Trump in November!

If you’re with our campaign, please consider making a donation of any amount to help us reach our 100 donor goal. [**You can click here to donate immediately.**](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4caHY-Rh7prXPl8zepG6YlPsMUfoWFQNAXDwgR2KMXW2tWDKg-MbEnnwMI6G-ovohMw&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_eom_1_friend&n=5)

Thank you for your support,

Amanda
Amanda Makki for Congress
Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th District
727-735-5921
For Contributions via Mail, please send to:
Amanda Makki for Congress
PO Box 47483
St. Petersburg, FL 33743
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_eom_1_friend&n=6). -=-=-

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Let me tell you about Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Mitch McConnell and his allies have pledged to spend nearly $15 million on attack ads in Arizona... [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0465/72412298/4c6d648c/61055e6d/467893751/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbWF5X3NwbGl0X2tlbGx5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IlZQUF9FTV9GUl8yMDA1MjlfS2VsbHlTdXJyX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_may_split_kelly?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200529_KellySurr_U1_X1&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200529_KellySurr_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200529_KellySurr_U1_X1") **Mitch McConnell and his allies have pledged to spend nearly $15 million on attack ads in Arizona.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0465/72412298/4c6d648c/61055e6c/467893751/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbWF5X3NwbGl0X2tlbGx5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IlZQUF9FTV9GUl8yMDA1MjlfS2VsbHlTdXJyX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_may_split_kelly?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200529_KellySurr_U1_X1&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200529_KellySurr_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200529_KellySurr_U1_X1") Peter -- Washington Republicans are sounding the alarm that we have a good chance at winning here in Arizona -- and that's all because of you._But here 's the thing, we've got a long way to go and we know Mitch McConnell will do anything to keep us from being successful._ **There are less than six months left until election day and we can 't afford to take our foot off the gas now. [Washington Republicans are turning their attention to my race, can I count on you to split a donation between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign today to help hit our end-of-month name: =?utf-8?Q?Hirsh=20Singh?=
subject: Explosive coverage of Rikin Mehta as "Hard Democrat"!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
It's undeniable — GOP datasets don't lie. |
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=a3388680a5&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,

You know the saying about rats and sinking ships.

Ever since President Trump's victory, the Democrat Party has been getting increasingly desperate. And with the 2020 election coming up, they're doing _everything_ they can to sabotage their rivals — **including infiltration.**

Well, we're not gonna fall for it. From the [Shore News Network](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=1af7eec697&e=3e017fab0f):
---
| |
## RNC Insider Candidate Profile Shows Rikin Mehta as “Hard Democrat”

_...in the GOP candidate profile database, the [Republican] party identifies Mehta as a “**Hard Democrat** ”. Screenshots published to the internet this week, which were confirmed as accurate, from the GOP Data Center show Mehta’s **secret file that is on record at the RNC.**_
---
| [STOP RINOS NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=973b3a840b&e=3e017fab0f "STOP RINOS NOW")
---
| From the moment Rikin Mehta entered the race, Republicans from all over New Jersey have seen this charade for what it is — **a Trojan Horse to keep Cory Booker in power.**

## This makes Rikin Mehta _extremely_ dangerous to uninformed patriots. They don't know that _**voting for Mehta means voting for Booker.**_ That's what the Democrats will be counting on.

Well now, with this bombshell report, we have _direct_ evidence that shows Rikin Mehta for what he is. A Big Pharma executive, a former Obama official and donor... and a **Hard Democrat**.

Unlike Mehta or Booker, the same report gives us one more finding: **_"Hirsh Singh, Mehta’s opponent in July, also has a record in the GOP database and clearly identified Singh as a 'Hard Republican'."_**

The coming November elections will be a battle to save New Jersey from another reign of terror, headed by Cory Booker.

It's critical that we get the word out, so voters can be informed: **A vote for Mehta is a vote for Booker.**

Thank you for fighting to save New Jersey.

Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**

_For the People_
Republican for U.S. Senate
---
|
---
| [EVERY EFFORT COUNTS — FIGHT BACK NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=44d5fad77b&e=3e017fab0f "EVERY EFFORT COUNTS — FIGHT BACK NOW")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=be3089000a&e=3e017fab0f)

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: We're still falling short, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Need your help
Friend - did you see Stacey's request for you?
---
Stacey knows as well as I do that we can - and must - win in Georgia to take back the Senate for Democrats, give everyday Georgians a voice in their government and restore moral leadership to Washington. But we've got an uphill battle ahead, with my opponent, Kelly Loeffler, flooding this race with attack ads and spending $20 million of her own fortune to buy this seat.
That's why I need your help, friend. We're facing down our most important fundraising deadline of the month, and if we want to flip Georgia blue, we can't afford to fall short of our $50,000 goal. **Grassroots supporters like you are the backbone of this people-powered campaign - so I have to ask: **
**[Please, will you chip in $5 or more now to help us meet our goal, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats? With you, me and Stacey working together, I know we can win this fight.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e471/288179be/b338684/348eaecc/46535956/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjQ0LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk244-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks, friend, I really appreciate your support.

Reverend Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------

From: Stacey Abrams
Subject: Why I'm with Reverend Warnock

| | |
---
Friend,

This is a difficult time in our nation's history.

The threats we're facing - from foreign election interference to stagnating wages to global health crises - put the future of our democracy at risk.
That's why this year's elections are the most consequential of our lifetimes -- and why it's never been more important to elect Democratic leaders who will fight for the most vulnerable among us. **That's why I endorsed Reverend Raphael Warnock for U.S. Senate in Georgia - [and why I'm asking you to support his campaign today.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e471/288179be/b338684/348eaecc/46535956/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjQ0LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk244-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Reverend Warnock is the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. If elected, he'd be the first black senator our state has _ever_ elected. Reverend Warnock is running to restore moral leadership to Washington and to stand up for Georgia families who have been left behind by Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump.
With Republicans turning their backs on the hardworking people of Georgia, it's never been more important _ _ to elect leaders like Reverend Warnock who will lead _by and for the people_ - someone who will be a champion for voting rights, workers' rights, affordable health care and more.

Reverend Warnock gives me hope that we can create a better and brighter future for all, not just the lucky few.
But here's what's at stake: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats _can_ take back the Senate - but we _have_ to win in Georgia. Winning this battleground state is key to Democrats righting the ship and retaking the Senate majority.
**Right now, Reverend Warnock is up against a crucial end-of-month deadline - but time is running out, and he can't hit his fundraising goal without your support. So I have to ask: [Please, friend, will you give $5 or more now - before the midnight deadline - to help Reverend Warnock reach his campaign's end-of-month goal, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e471/288179be/b338684/348eaecc/46535956/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjQ0LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk244-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for fighting with us.

Stacey Abrams
